Name: OTTO
Description:
OTTO is the largest german online shop and one of the largest employers in Hamburg. For over 75 years, we have been constantly evolving to offer our customers the best shopping experience possible.
 
Our channel is all about jobs, career tips, and insights into our working world. We also keep you up to date on topics that matter to us—such as tech, diversity, and sustainability.
 
What makes OTTO special? With over 18 million items from more than 34,000 brands, over 12.2 million customers, and over 6,200 partners, OTTO is the largest german online shop. With courage, passion, and openness to change, we invest in new technologies. Always at the center: our customers and the positive shopping experience in the app and on otto.de.
 
How do we work at OTTO? With around 6,000 employees, we are one of Hamburg's largest employers. New Work is part of our work culture. We work hybrid, i.e., both on our campus in Bramfeld and remotely from home or another mobile location, depending on the job and task.
 
Work-life balance is important to us at OTTO. To this end, we offer various benefits such as flexitime, workation, sabbaticals, and part-time work – even in all management positions. You can find all this here on LinkedIn or on Instagram https://www.instagram.com/otto_inside/
 
You can find more information about tech on our tech blog: https://otto.de/techblog
 
If you have any questions about our job postings or your application, please contact the relevant person in OTTO's recruitment department. You can contact them directly here: otto.me/2nfQU8d
 
Legal notice: https://www.otto.de/unternehmen/de/impressum/

Name: flaconi
Description:
With over 5 million active customers, flaconi is Germany's leading online retailer for beauty and perfume. The online shop’s extensive portfolio consists of around 1,000 national and international brands and 50,000 products. With categories such as perfume, skincare, makeup, haircare, natural cosmetics, beauty tools, and accessories, the online shop covers all product segments and offers a diverse selection of products for individual and daily beauty routines. Founded in 2011 as one of the first online perfumeries, flaconi is now successfully continuing its history as one of the largest, holistic beauty online pure players in Germany  flaconi is proud to work with around 700 employees from 60 different nations at its headquarters in Berlin-Charlottenburg and in its logistics center in Halle. 

The flaconi online shop has won numerous awards and is present not only in Germany but also in Austria, France, Poland, Switzerland, Belgium, the Netherlands, Denmark, Sweden, Finland, Czechia, and Italy.

Name: Kaufland e-commerce
Description:
++ WHO WE ARE ++
We at Kaufland e-commerce are an independent tech company within Schwarz Digits, responsible for operating and developing Kaufland’s international online marketplaces. 
Our company is comprised of over 850 talents hailing from more than 60 nations. We unite this diversity of perspectives and strengths in interdisciplinary teams to help us find the best solutions for various projects. For projects like the Kaufland-App and the Kaufland Card, we work in close cooperation with our colleagues from Kaufland, combining online and branch stores into one shopping experience for our customers. 

++WHAT WE DO ++
The international Kaufland marketplaces are the beating heart of our day-to-day work. Together as a team, we make sure our customers have an outstanding and safe shopping experience. More than 13,000 online sellers offer a wide range of products in over 6,400 categories.
The success of the Kaufland marketplaces is based on our Kaufland Global Marketplace brand – a comprehensive all-in-one solution that allows sellers to use just one registration to sell on all five online marketplaces.

++ WHAT SETS US APART ++
We have a dynamic company culture which is marked by flat hierarchies, a strong team spirit and an open culture based on learning and making mistakes. One of the foundational elements of our culture are our Company Principles, which we actively live and which are integrated in various processes from onboarding onward.

++ OUR VISION AND MISSION ++
We firmly believe that our success is based on a forward-thinking mindset, guided by a clear vision. Our goal is to offer added value to our customers, our partners and our society. #FromEuropeForEurope
Learn more about our Vision & Mission: https://kaufland-ecommerce.com/en/culture/

We offer flexibility. You can work in any of our offices in Cologne, Darmstadt, Düsseldorf or remotely from anywhere inside of Germany.

Imprint: https://kaufland-ecommerce.com/impressum/

Vi som arbetar på apotea.se har lång erfarenhet av näthandel och sedan 2011 har vi Läkemedelsverkets tillstånd att bedriva apotek med ett heltäckande sortiment av både receptfria och receptbelagda läkemedel. Name: YesStyle.com
Description:
YesStyle.com is a subsidiary of YesAsia Holdings Limited (2209.HK: Hong Kong Stock Exchange), a publicly listed company that owns and operates a number of online retail platforms, including YesAsia.com and AsianBeautyWholesale.com. On the strength of YesStyle.com’s growth and success, the company made its initial public offering in July 2021.

Launched in July 2006, the YesStyle.com website brought the success of YesAsia.com’s proven e-commerce platform and technology to the next level by diversifying into beauty, fashion and lifestyle products, and quickly established itself as an exciting and unique shopping destination. We at YesStyle pride ourselves on our wide selection of quality products from premium brands across Asia, including Cosrx, Dear, Klairs, Mizon, Memebox, Some by Mi, Purito, romand, CLIO, HOLIKA HOLIKA, SKINFOOD and chuu. Our selection features everything from beauty products and casual or chic fashion for women, men and children to home accessories, decorations, gadgets, lifestyle items, outdoor equipment, travel goods, pet supplies and more.

With our meticulously curated collections and recommendations, we serve our customers across the globe for every occasion or situation. Our commitment to quality and our “customers first” mindset has helped YesStyle become one of the fastest growing e-commerce businesses worldwide, with an average year-on-year business growth of 35% and an Instagram following of over 1.3 million users.

Our Mission:
"To provide customers with an exciting shopping experience, superior service and a fine selection of affordable, high quality Asian beauty products, and Asian fashion and lifestyle products."

YesStyle’s future business strategies are to continue striving for a perfect customer experience to maintain our competitive edge, to build strategic alliances with premium brands, and to grow and develop our talents to maintain our business success.

Come explore how we find our yes!

Name: RS France
Description:
RS France est une marque du Groupe RS plc, distributeur mondial pour les clients et fournisseurs industriels impliqués dans la conception, la construction ou la maintenance d’équipements et d’installations industrielles.

 Présent dans 31 pays
 Plus de 1 000 000 produits 
 d’un million de clients
 Plus de 60 000 colis par jour
 2 500 fournisseurs

Notre offre comprend différentes gammes : semiconducteurs, interconnexion, composants passifs et électro-mécaniques, automatisme et contrôle, électrique, test et mesure, outillage et consommables.
Nous accompagnons nos clients tout au long du cycle de vie des produits :
 que ce soit par l'innovation et l'assistance technique lors de la phase de conception,
 l'amélioration du délai de commercialisation et de la productivité dès la phase de construction, 
 ou en réduisant les coûts d'achat et en optimisant les stocks dans la phase de maintenance.

RS France regroupe aujourd’hui plus de 500 collaborateurs : 
· 120 commerciaux, 
· 70 conseillers au service de nos clients par mail, chat et téléphone, 
· 120 collaborateurs aux fonctions supports,
· 220 à la logistique,
· 20 techniciens.

Nous assurons un accompagnement terrain grâce à une étroite collaboration avec nos 170 fabricants partenaires.

Enfin, RS propose aussi des solutions achats (vente en ligne, système de délégation des achats et d’e-procurement), d’inventaire (RS ScanStock, RS VendStock, RS Magasin Autonome), de maintenance (GMAO & capteurs IoT, solutions 3D scanning / BIM, Métrologie) et sur-mesure (des boîtiers, cordons et connecteurs ainsi que l’impression 3D) pour accompagner ses clients au mieux.

Name: DOONAILS
Description:
Hey, wir sind Doonails – und wir haben uns ein großes Ziel gesetzt: Wir wollen Maniküre neu denken! 

Mit unseren Produkten holst du dir perfekte Nägel ganz easy direkt nach Hause. Denn bei uns gibt’s keine „One-size-fits-all“-Lösungen – wir glauben an individuelle Routinen, die genauso einzigartig sind wie du.

Gegründet 2020, sind wir aus purer Leidenschaft gestartet, um dir professionelle Maniküre-Ergebnisse für Zuhause zu liefern. Nach Monaten des Tüftelns war unser erstes Set bereit – und zack, der Shop ging live!  Heute sind wir in mehreren Ländern am Start, in Drogerien und online, mit über 300.000 glücklichen Kunden und einem internationalen Team von über 50 kreativen Köpfen. .

Doonails ist mehr als ein Beauty-Start-up: Wir schaffen Erlebnisse, geben Individualität Raum und machen deine Maniküre-Routine so einfach wie möglich. Mit unseren drei innovativen Methoden und unserer pflegenden Nail Care Line bringen wir Style und Pflege in dein Leben – easy, schön und stressfrei. 

Unsere Doonails Werte:

 Care
Unsere Kunden und unser Team stehen immer an erster Stelle. Wir packen an, helfen, wo es nötig ist, und sorgen dafür, dass jeder sich unterstützt fühlt – egal ob beim Produkt oder im Alltag.

 Community
Wir wollen mehr als nur Produkte – wir wollen eine Community schaffen! Eine, in der du Ideen teilen, Tipps bekommen und dich inspirieren lassen kannst. So wird Maniküre zum Erlebnis.

 Growth
Stillstand? Nicht bei uns! Wir lernen, wachsen und verbessern uns ständig – ob bei unseren Produkten, im Team oder bei uns selbst.

 Simplicity
Schönheit muss nicht kompliziert sein. Unsere Produkte sind so einfach, dass du dich voll aufs Ergebnis konzentrieren kannst – und das ganz ohne Stress.

 Uniqueness
Deine Schönheit ist einzigartig – und genauso sollte deine Maniküre sein. Wir geben dir die Tools an die Hand, damit du deine Individualität grenzenlos ausleben kannst.

Name: Ecom Style
Description:
Somos una marca de eCommerce (No agencia): Creamos productos innovadores y los vendemos directo al consumidor en Estados Unidos, AU, UK, CA y Europa. Todo esto, desde Sudamerica.

No somos para todos. Somos para los que buscan romper sus propios límites, para los que aman trabajar duro, aprender rápido y construir algo que realmente importe. 
Aca no hay lugar para lo mediocre. Si buscás comodidad o mediocridad, este no es tu lugar. Si estás listo para darlo todo y jugar en el máximo nivel, welcome onboard!

¿Qué Ofrecemos?
Crecimiento Exponencial: Si tenés lo que se necesita, acá vas a crecer más rápido que en cualquier otro lado. Invertimos mucho en capacitacion y desarrollo.
Flexibilidad con Responsabilidad: ¿Remoto? Sí. ¿Relajado? No. Acá tenés libertad, pero siempre atada a resultados concretos y de alto nivel. 
Autonomia: Confiamos en nuestra gente, dejamos tomar decisiones y liderar cambios, no importa tu puesto. Vas a poder implementar y ver resultados de tu trabajo en una marca global que nace desde 0

Desde nuestra creación en 2020, hemos enviado más de 350,000 productos de art & crafts. Nuestro propósito es ayudar a revivir la creatividad en la vida de las personas haciendo que hacer art & crafts sea simple y divertido. Todo esto a travez de un portfolio de marcas en esa industria!

Gracias por leer, valoramos que te tomes el tiempo y llegues a aca abajo. No todos lo hacen, buscamos gente como vos que si lo haga

Name: Moonshot Brands
Description:
Moonshot Brands acquires, operates, and grows e-commerce businesses.
We empower entrepreneurs.  If you know a company that could be a good fit, please get in touch, we have a $25,000 referral program if a deal closes.
We believe in an omni-channel future, if you have built your business on Amazon or direct to consumer on Shopify, reach out to us about taking it to the next level.

Selling a business is never easy. Most e-commerce sellers have worked hard to grow their business to their current size and now need more bench strength to boost their bottom lines.

Moonshot Brands is here to help your business reach its full potential, while you continue to have a seat at the table. Our process is fast and simple.

We believe that selling your business can be empowering.

Our business selection criteria

Growing & Profitable - Your business is profitable on each channel you sell-through and has an annual revenue of $1M to $30M.

Product Focus - Your products are either from high-growth, evergreen, or high potential niche industries.

Scalable Structure - You already have product-market fit and are ready to put more gas on the fire.

For all customer related questions and inquiries, reach out to support-cs@razor-group.com!

Name: CoopCircuits
Description:
CoopCircuits est une société coopérative d'intérêt collectif (SCIC) qui soutient le développement des circuits courts, en fournissant à prix juste des outils et des services pour faciliter la gestion des activités de distribution en circuit court.

Activités :

    Mise à disposition d’une plateforme e-commerce sous licence libre, permettant la création de boutiques en ligne adaptées à tout type d’organisateur de circuit court, et la gestion des ventes du champ à l’assiette
    Accompagnement, conseil, formation à destination des organisateurs de circuits courts, au démarrage ou en cours d’activité, pour les faire gagner en efficacité par le partage de connaissances et d’expériences
    Prestation d’intégration d’outils sur mesure (connexion à outil comptable, outil de mailing, etc.)
    Édition de solutions numériques open source pour les circuits courts : par exemple, création de sites web, cartographies, création de plateforme dédiée pour un collectif / une institution.

Un commun numérique :

    La coopérative déploie sa plateforme de vente en France à partir d’un logiciel libre développé à une échelle internationale par le réseau Open Food Network et s’appuie sur une communauté d’utilisateurs pour faire évoluer les outils de gestion selon les besoins des organisateurs de circuits courts.
    La coopérative appartient et est gouvernée par les circuits courts qui utilisent ses services : producteurs, artisans, épiceries, groupements d'achat...

Une coopérative engagée :

Als merkonafhankelijke leverancier bieden wij producten van verschillende betrouwbare merken, zoals Signify/Philips, Ledvance/Osram, Trilux, SPL, Beacon, Elstead, Elpro, Megaman, Macbright en Prolumia.

Of het nu gaat om een energiezuinige oplossing voor een magazijn, een plafondventilator voor de slaapkamer of wandverlichting in een restaurant: we denken graag mee en zorgen dat je de juiste keuze maakt.

Name: Retrophiliac
Description:
Retrophiliac by Margaux Wosk stands as a pioneering business, proudly owned by an Autistic individual. Specializing in distinctive enamel pins, patches, stickers, and more, our product line takes a dedicated approach to addressing communication needs, Autism, Disability, identities, pronouns, LGBTQIA2+, and beyond.

Margaux is passionately committed to challenging narrow perspectives that limit the potential of disabled and neurodivergent individuals to traditional employment. Our overarching goal is to shatter stigma by showcasing the possibilities of self-employment. Margaux envisions establishing a mentorship program with an integrated grant, nurturing the incubation, development, and realization of ideas from disabled and neurodivergent creators. Upholding the principle of "nothing about us without us," we recognize that our own community members are best positioned to serve and innovate for us. We represent an untapped source of genuine innovation, making us the ideal choice for supporting and uplifting our diverse and vibrant community.

Notably, Retrophiliac items are available in over 45 retail stores across the United States and Canada. Margaux's impactful journey has been featured in AMI's Our Community Episode titled "We Belong," and their neurodiversity pride pin has earned a spot in the Museum of Vancouver's openMOV exhibit. Margaux's dedication has also been recognized through various grants, and they have emerged as a finalist for several prestigious awards.

Name: LAFRANCAISE - Mailles in France
Description:
LAFRANÇAISE joue le Jeu du Style et de  L’éthique
avec une Maille Cool et Chic de Fabrication 100% Française.

LAFRANCAISE est une marque de maille Française fabriquée exclusivement en France dont l’essentiel de la collection est confectionné dans son atelier De Villers-Bocage labellisé France Terre Textile. 
Soucieuse de soutenir des métiers devenus rares ( remaillage, raccoutrage, bonneterie, tricotage…) elle perpétue ces savoir-faire depuis plus de 100 ans grâce à son atelier Normand. En 2023, elle réinvente la fabrication 100% made in France avec une nouvelle création de mailles qui affirme un style cool, féminin et chic. La maille joue le grand jeu et affirme une élégance nonchalante et joyeuse. Aux intemporels du vestiaire féminin s’associent des pièces fortes ou les volumes, les couleurs et les détails embrassent l’air du temps. Les fils et les matières premières sélectionnées chez les meilleurs filateurs européens offrent une maille au confort absolu et à la sensualité naturelle. 
La marque s'engage également dans une démarche de durabilité en privilégiant des matières naturelles et durables, et en favorisant une production respectueuse de l'environnement. Elle produit seulement 2 collections par an et fabrique ses pièces en quantité limitée afin de produire au plus juste et éviter les stocks d’invendus.  Elle assure une seconde vie aux vêtements dans une logique d’économie circulaire et propose la réparabilité à vie de ses mailles, rendue possible grâce à la conservation de nos fils dans notre atelier et aux talents de nos raccoutreuses, remailleuses.

At Koin, we specialise in creating and growing exceptional online brands that captivate audiences worldwide. Founded in 2012, we’ve built a reputation for transforming bold ideas into thriving e-commerce businesses, driven by innovation, creativity, and a commitment to delivering outstanding customer experiences.

As a pure e-commerce company, our mission is clear: to develop and acquire brands that resonate with customers and have the potential to succeed on a global scale. From product ideation to seamless online sales, we focus on every detail to ensure our brands stand out in competitive markets. Our success is fueled by a passion for identifying untapped opportunities, optimising customer journeys, and leveraging technology to drive growth and efficiency.

Our portfolio is diverse and ever-growing, with each brand designed to solve real-world needs, spark curiosity, and deliver value. Whether through imaginative new launches or strategic acquisitions, every brand we create carries a commitment to quality, creativity, and customer satisfaction. With an eye on sustainability and a focus on meaningful connections, we strive to build businesses that make a lasting impact.

Looking ahead, we’re on an ambitious journey to achieve £100 million in turnover by 2030. This growth will come through smart diversification, expansion into new markets, and continuous investment in our operational infrastructure. By embracing innovation and adapting to the evolving digital landscape, we are well-positioned to reach our goals and continue delivering excellence to our customers worldwide.

Name: The Textile District LLC | Custom Fabric Printing | USA
Description:
The Textile District is NC-based online retailer and custom fabric printer serving professional designers, custom clothiers, small batch manufacturers, special events planners, and do-it-yourself sewing, interior design and hobby enthusiasts. Our eco-friendly, OEKO-TEX certified process and colorfast, fiber reactive dyes ensure excellent print clarity, vibrant colors, and soft finish. All natural fiber substrates are steamed, washed, and dried. All fabrics print to order in the USA, and are production ready — for apparel, home decor, upholstery/furniture restoration, and more!

If you need a specific substrate not listed on our website, please give us a call or send us a note! We also offer ground fabrics and custom finishing options for hospitality and commercial use.

Name: MyPiscine
Description:
Fondée en 2009, Mypiscine.com est une société de e-commerce française spécialisée dans l'univers de la piscine, bien être et jardin.

Les 4 piliers du concept de MyPiscine.com sont : délais, expertise, prix et service. 

 Le délai : la quasi totalité du matériel proposé sur notre site est en stock, au sein de notre plateforme logistique. Plus de 7M€ en pleine saison. Notre outil logistique nous permet d'expédier toutes commandes passées sur Mypiscine.com avant midi le jour même.

 L'expertise : nous sommes à la fois experts dans le domaine du E-Commerce ET de la piscine. Ainsi, nos développeurs informatiques côtoient chaque jour nos techniciens spécialistes de la piscine. C'est l'ADN de Mypiscine, depuis ses débuts. Une savoureuse alchimie !

 Le prix : nous ne sommes pas toujours les moins chers, mais garantissons l'achat au juste prix. Cette notion, qui nous est primordiale, permet à la société de consolider ses bases financières tout en préservant notre éthique : aucune externalisation à l'étranger.

 Le service : pourquoi acheter sur internet serait il moins bien que d'acheter en boutique traditionnelle ? 
Nous essayons de démontrer le contraire, sans pour autant dresser un mur entre ces deux secteurs d'activité.  Nous sommes complémentaires.

Name: MayFli
Description:
MayFli is passionate about helping UK Small Businesses grow within the new online world that is dominated by a few large Marketplaces.  These corporations are dominating the small business world by making it harder and more expensive for small businesses to be seen by the local community.  Most of these companies are owned by people that have not started from the ground up and don't understand the struggles of starting a small business.  MayFli gives a safe place for amazing UK businesses to sell their products.  Allowing buyers to experience a personal one to one service with small independent shops online within the UK.  Creating an incredible shopping experience either online or by shopping local with our Shop Local search map facility.  

We want to help small businesses within the UK to thrive, not just survive.  We want to change the way UK people shop online,  encouraging buyers to shop with MayFli knowing that with every purchase, they have given back to the community helping to keep the UK strong.  Small Businesses are at the heart of the UK economy, with all Small to Medium businesses making up 99.9% of all private sector businesses in the UK.

Thank you so much for taking the time and reading about our mission at MayFli,  I hope you can join us in our mission to support all of our Great Small Independent Business by making MayFli the Number marketplace for all your personalised and unique items which will benefit us all.

Enjoy looking around our lovely shops and I am sure you will be thrilled with the products and services you receive from all the shops within MayFli.

Mayfli

Name: VRAIE
Description:
VRAIE accompagne les entreprises de Bretagne et des Pays de la Loire, lors de leurs moments de convivialité, grâce à l'animation d'ateliers œnologiques et la conception de coffrets cadeaux personnalisés. 

Les ateliers œnologiques de VRAIE sont de véritables moments conviviaux pour les professionnels. Ils sont ludiques et participatifs, riches d’anecdotes sur les vignobles de France et sur les méthodes de fabrication du vin. 
VRAIE vous transmet son expertise et vous initie aux techniques de dégustation des vins. Vous apprendrez une méthode pour vous permettre de parler et de décrire un vin, ses arômes, ses saveurs, son équilibre, en toute simplicité.
Ces ateliers mêlent plaisir et apprentissages. Ancrés dans le patrimoine culturel français, ils renforcent la cohésion d’équipe et le partage, notamment au moment de la dégustation.

Les coffrets cadeaux personnalisés que VRAIE propose sont gourmands, éthiques et porteurs de la raison d’être de votre entreprise ou d’un message spécifique. 
Après un moment d’écoute et d’échange privilégié pour comprendre votre ADN, VRAIE vous fait une proposition qui VOUS correspond, respectueuse de l’environnement et adaptée à votre budget.
Composés de boissons, de gourmandises et de produits d’artisanat 100% français, vos coffrets cadeaux font plaisir à vos salariés et clients, tout en véhiculant vos valeurs d’entreprise ou un message spécifique grâce à des surprises personnalisées.

Name: Paradise Foods
Description:
Delivering kindness and groceries! Paradise Foods is a European groceries wholesaler & supplier operating across the Caribbean.

We deliver European imports and local Caribbean goods to sailors, charters, yachts, villas, hotels, restaurants, supermarkets and grocery distributors.

 Martinique • Guadeloupe • St. Martin • St. Vincent • Bequia • Mustique • Canouan • St. Barth • Barbados

HOW IT WORKS

1) For Travelers, Sailors & Charter Guests (Mobile App)

Our iOS and Android app makes provisioning easy for anyone on the water or on vacation.

Select your island
Choose delivery location (marina, mooring, anchorage, villa)
Add your favorite products 
Pay securely (Card, Apple Pay, Google Pay)
Get fast delivery!

2) For Charter Companies & Concierge Partners (Professional Shop)

We offer a web-based professional shop for B2B partners, dedicated to fleet operators, brokers, yacht managers and villa concierges.

Features include:
• Partner pricing & negotiated rates
• Multi-boat & multi-villa order management
• Budget tools for cruises and villas
• Recurring orders & templates
• Real-time stock and order tracking
• Flexible payments 

Created to simplify your fleet provisioning and streamline operations.

3) For grocery distributors, supermarkets, hotels, and restaurants ordering in bulk (Wholesale)

To receive a customized offer, please email business@paradisefoods.com with the following details:
• The island you wish to order to
• Main product groups
• Approximate quantities
• Preferred order frequency (weekly, monthly, or seasonal)
Our team prepares a personalized proposal with detailed landed prices and responds within 24 hours.

Name: Enzers
Description:
Enzers è una start-up torinese che crea prodotti sostenibili per la pulizia della casa.

Ogni anno ci sono 2,41 milioni di tonnellate di rifiuti plastici dovuti al monouso della plastica, di cui il 62% deriva dall'uso domestico. Il 93% della plastica contenuta nei prodotti per la pulizia domestica viene buttato.

La presenza di plastica in mare è una delle maggiori problematiche ambientali. Prendere coscienza del problema e del proprio ruolo nella salvaguardia del pianeta, è un passo fondamentale.

La missione di Enzers è ridurre a 0 lo spreco di plastica nei prodotti della pulizia domestica, offrendo soluzioni innovative, semplici da utilizzare e più economiche rispetto alle soluzioni tradizionali.

Infine, i prodotti Enzers seguono i seguenti valori:

• Eco-friendly
• Zero waste
• Vegan
• Cruelty-Free
• Non-toxic
• Thoughtful Packaging

Name: Jardin & Terroir
Description:
Bienvenue sur Jardin & Terroir ! Nous sommes une plateforme en ligne dédiée à la vente de produits du terroir et de l'horticulture Français en direct des producteurs.

Notre mission est de soutenir les petits producteurs indépendants en leur offrant une plateforme pour vendre leurs produits directement aux consommateurs. Nous croyons que les produits locaux de saisons sont non seulement plus frais et plus savoureux, mais aussi plus durables et plus éthiques que les produits importés.

Chez Jardin & Terroir, nous travaillons en étroite collaboration avec les producteurs français les plus talentueux pour vous offrir une sélection de produits de saison de qualité. Nous nous efforçons de faire des achats en circuit-court une expérience simple et agréable pour les consommateurs, tout en soutenant les producteurs dans leur développement.

Nous croyons que les consommateurs peuvent faire une différence significative en choisissant de soutenir les petits producteurs. C'est pourquoi nous vous invitons à découvrir leurs produits sur notre site web et à faire la différence. En achetant sur Jardin & Terroir vous soutenez leurs savoir-faire et l’économie locale.

Nous sommes fiers de vous offrir un service de qualité et nous sommes toujours là pour répondre à vos questions et à vos besoins. N'hésitez pas à nous contacter pour plus d'informations sur nos produits et sur notre entreprise.

Merci de nous faire confiance pour promouvoir le commerce local !

L'équipe de Jardin & Terroir.

Name: Gyawun.com
Description:
www.gyawun.com is an exclusive online destination dedicated to celebrating and preserving the rich heritage of Kashmir through authentic handicrafts, luxury apparel, and cultural storytelling. Rooted deeply in Kashmiri tradition, Gyawun curates a carefully selected range of artisanal products including luxury pherans, handwoven stoles, intricate sozni embroidery pieces, and exquisite shawls crafted by skilled local artisans. Each item embodies the timeless artistry, culture, and elegance of Kashmir, merging contemporary appeal with traditional craftsmanship.

Gyawun's mission goes beyond commerce; it seeks to empower local artisans by showcasing their skills on a global platform, helping sustain ancient arts and supporting community livelihoods. With a strong emphasis on authenticity and quality, every product at Gyawun represents a narrative woven with passion, care, and cultural pride.

The website also serves as an informative and engaging resource, presenting stories, traditions, and insights into the vibrant Kashmiri lifestyle. Visitors to Gyawun experience Kashmir's essence through compelling visuals, insightful articles, and immersive storytelling, creating meaningful connections between consumers and creators.

In essence, www.gyawun.com is not merely an e-commerce site—it is a cultural bridge connecting the world with Kashmir’s rich legacy, blending tradition and luxury in a seamless, elegant, and memorable experience.

Name: Les Super Heros de la Supply Chain
Description:
Les Super Heros de la Supply Chain proposent des ouvrages qui évoquent, d’une manière pédagogique et ludique, les différentes facettes de la logistique et de la Supply Chain.

La bande dessinée "Les Super Héros de la Supply Chain, la bande dessinée à l'usage de votre entourage qui n'a jamais compris ce que vous faisiez exactement", vise à aborder modestement ce sujet à travers des situations qu’un grand nombre de professionnels ont déjà vécues. Les dessins sont complétés par quelques textes explicatifs qui apportent un éclairage supplémentaire, notamment aux lecteurs « non-initiés ».

Le livre illustré "Il était une fois la Supply Chain, une histoire illustrée qui raconte pourquoi et comment la logistique "globale" est devenue le Supply Chain Management en quelques années", raconte l’origine du Supply Chain Management et la manière dont il s’est imposé en France. Cette chronologie propose un témoignage qui se veut à la fois pédagogique et accessible. L'ouvrage est agrémenté de témoignages de personnalités marquantes, et illustré par de nombreux dessins qui apportent une touche humoristique.

Rendez-vous sur notre site pour découvrir nos ouvrages, 
et chaque vendredi pour retrouver "Le petit édito des Super Héros", l'actualité illustrée de la Supply Chain.

W naszej ofercie znajdziesz różnego rodzaju spawarki - od prostych i ekonomicznych, aż po zaawansowane modele dedykowane do przemysłowych zastosowań. Oferujemy również szeroki wybór elektrod spawalniczych, drutów spawalniczych oraz płynów gazowych, niezbędnych do wykonania profesjonalnych prac spawalniczych.

Nasza oferta obejmuje również osprzęt gazowy, tak jak reduktory, palniki, węże i akcesoria do spawania gazowego. Znajdziesz u nas różnorodne rodzaje gazu do spawania, jak również zbiorniki i butle do przechowywania gazu.

Dbamy o to, aby nasza oferta była jak najbardziej kompleksowa i zaspokajała potrzeby naszych klientów. Dlatego oferujemy także różnego rodzaju akcesoria i narzędzia do spawania, takie jak maski spawalnicze, rękawice ochronne, ściski i wiele innych.

Współpracujemy z wiodącymi producentami sprzętu spawalniczego, aby dostarczać naszym klientom produkty najwyższej jakości. Nasz sklep internetowy zapewnia wygodne i bezpieczne zakupy, a nasz doświadczony personel jest zawsze gotów odpowiedzieć na wszystkie pytania i doradzić w wyborze odpowiedniego sprzętu.

Zapraszamy do zapoznania się z naszą ofertą oraz skorzystania z naszych usług.

SIXBY EOOD ist ein familiengeführter Grosshändler im Bereich Trinkgläser. Seit unserer Gründung im Jahr 2007 stehen bei uns Qualität und absolute Zuverlässigkeit im Vordergrund. Dank unserer jahrelangen Erfahrung in der Gastronomie wissen wir genau, was unsere Kunden brauchen. Wir liefern europaweit hochwertige Gläser an B2B Kunden, Hotels, Gastronomiebetriebe, Catering-Unternehmen und Veranstaltungsorganisatoren.

Name: Moteev
Description:
Moteev is building Africa’s fastest, most reliable online supermarket. We solve the daily problem of grocery shopping for busy young professionals and students by combining three elements: a NLP powered mobile app for ordering, neighbourhood storage hubs for inventory, and our own fleet of riders for last-mile delivery.

Unlike existing options that rely on informal motorcycle riders or fragmented store networks, Moteev integrates the full stack, catalogue management, fulfilment, and delivery, enabling us to deliver 500+ products, from fresh produce to pantry staples and meat, in under 40 minutes.

Our vision is to scale from thousands to millions of orders per month by expanding across African cities, starting with university campuses as our first growth engine.

Ultimately, Moteev is not just a delivery service, it is infrastructure for how Africans will buy everyday essentials online, a $50B+ opportunity in the next five years.

Ispirata all’eleganza del Lago di Como, sviluppa prodotti innovativi con ingredienti selezionati, sfruttando biotecnologie avanzate per garantire risultati efficaci e rispettosi della pelle.

Ogni formula è realizzata in Italia con standard elevati e senza parabeni, siliconi o petrolati. L’azienda si distingue per l’uso di attivi naturali e biotecnologici come acido ialuronico, peptidi e vitamine, ideali per idratare, rigenerare e contrastare i segni del tempo. La sostenibilità è un valore fondamentale: i prodotti sono cruelty-free, con packaging eco-friendly e processi produttivi a basso impatto ambientale.

La linea Dermastudio Como include creme, sieri, detergenti e trattamenti mirati per ogni esigenza della pelle, offrendo un’esperienza skincare efficace e sicura. La missione dell’azienda è rendere la bellezza accessibile a tutti, combinando innovazione, qualità e benessere.

Scopri la nostra collezione e vivi l’eccellenza della skincare italiana.

Name: WildVoie
Description:
Adventure calls—in the whisper of the wind, the crunch of trails beneath your feet, and the promise of discovery waiting just beyond the horizon. At WildVoie, we’re here for those who seek the raw beauty of the outdoors and the thrill of adventure.

Born from a deep love of exploration, WildVoie is more than an outdoor gear store—it’s a gateway to freedom. Our name reflects our passion for the wild path (“Voie”), the road less traveled, where every turn unveils new experiences. It’s a call to step off the beaten track and forge your own journey, embracing the beauty, challenges, and unpredictability of the natural world.

At WildVoie, we specialize in equipping adventurers with the tools they need to go further and connect more deeply with nature. From high-performance e-bikes designed to conquer rugged terrain to durable camping tents that provide shelter in even the harshest conditions, our products are built for those who don’t just visit the outdoors but live for it. Each piece of gear is handpicked with the true adventurer in mind, ensuring reliability, performance, and a connection to the untamed wilderness.

WildVoie is more than gear—it’s a community of like-minded explorers who value freedom, discovery, and the power of the natural world to inspire and rejuvenate. We are for those who embrace challenges, find beauty in the unpredictable, and long to reconnect with the world around them.

Our mission is simple: to help you go further, explore deeper, and ignite your adventurous spirit. Whether you're summiting a remote peak, cycling down rugged trails, or camping under a star-filled sky, WildVoie is here to support your journey.

Pack your curiosity, stoke the fire of your adventurous spirit, and step into the wild. At WildVoie, we invite you to dare to roam, to break free from the ordinary, and to live your adventure.

WildVoie: Dare to roam.

Name: Go Cartly
Description:
About Us

Go Cartly is an early-stage startup with a simple mission: to make online shopping easier, faster, and more enjoyable for everyone.

We are a team of curious, driven individuals who believe that the future of retail lies in simplicity, connection, and accessibility. In a world where online shopping can often feel overwhelming with too many options, inconsistent supplier experiences, and scattered content, we’re working on building a platform that brings it all together in a smarter way.

At this stage, we’re laying the groundwork. That means wearing many hats and tackling the essential building blocks of a modern e-commerce brand:

Content & Storytelling: Crafting engaging, relatable narratives to connect with shoppers and suppliers.

Supplier Partnerships: Building trusted relationships to ensure variety, quality, and reliability in what we offer.

Social Media Engagement: Creating an authentic digital presence to grow a community around our vision.

Team Collaboration: Empowering our small but passionate team to innovate, experiment, and learn as we go.

We don’t yet have a website or a finished product to showcase, but that’s the exciting part. We’re in the process of learning, testing, and shaping our ideas into something impactful. What sets us apart is our culture: a group of curious minds who aren’t afraid to ask questions, try new things, and rethink the way online shopping can and should work.

Our long-term vision is to build a platform that benefits both sides of the shopping experience. For shoppers, Go Cartly will provide a seamless, trustworthy, and enjoyable way to discover and buy products. For suppliers, we aim to offer a space where they can connect with customers more directly, share their stories, and grow their businesses without unnecessary friction.

Above all, Go Cartly is about people: our team, our partners, and the shoppers we serve. Every step we take is guided by the belief that technology should simplify life.

With a focus on innovation and sustainability, we import and distribute a range of non-toxic, pyrethrum-based insect repellents.

Our products are designed for rapid action, offering a 90% reduction in flies and mosquitoes within just three days, backed by a full money-back guarantee. Recognizing the importance of safety, our sprays exhibit no toxicity to humans and pets, making them ideal for use in homes, as well as in sensitive environments like hotels, restaurants, spas, and clinics.

In addition to our flagship repellents, we provide a selection of automated dispensers, ensuring continuous protection with minimal environmental impact. While our products are available nationwide, we offer specialized installation and maintenance services exclusively in Phnom Penh.

At Bug-Free Home, we're not just about pest control; we're about creating healthier living spaces. Our commitment to non-toxic solutions means you can enjoy peace of mind, knowing you're protected without harming the planet. Join us in our mission to safeguard Cambodia from mosquito-borne diseases, one bug-free zone at a time.

Vína uchováváme a dovážíme videálních podmínkách z našeho pražského sklepa, kde je máme všechna skladem, doručujeme je již vden objednání a prodáváme za cenu stejnou jako vinař. Pořádáme tematické degustace, umělecká setkání a dodáváme do restaurací či společností. A zkušeně poradíme svýběrem, protože… kvalita je pro nás otázkou správného výběru. Více na www.umenivina.cz

Description:
We create e-commerce solutions using the latest technology and adhere to MACH standards. Additionally, we develop digital solutions that can help you achieve levels of success you may not have thought possible. Our founders have accumulated over 70 years of experience in e-commerce and digital solutions since 1998.

We pride ourselves on our unique problem-solving approach, inspired by Albert Einstein's philosophy. He once said that if he had only one hour to solve a problem, he would spend 55 minutes understanding the problem and reserve just 5 minutes for finding a solution. We've adopted a similar mindset in our CLAIN approach.

With CLAIN, we first deeply understand your short-term and long-term needs. Then, we explore if we can address those needs using the tools within the CLAIN approach, which stands for Copilot, Low code, AI-tools, and No code. This approach often allows us to solve problems 10 to 100 times faster than traditional methods.

In addition, we embrace a complementary strategy we refer to as 'Ghosts.' This strategy combines elements of outsourcing and nearsourcing, amplified for efficiency. Why limit yourself to a small team when we collaborate with the world's LARGEST network of freelancers, each specializing in various skills? Through our approach and network, we operate as a limitless, borderless organization, reducing unnecessary costs that would otherwise be passed on to the customer. This not only results in more cost-effective solutions but also faster delivery without bureaucratic hurdles.

Our services are available in both English and Swedish, and in the near future, we'll be able to accommodate any language with the assistance of AI. 

We also offer AI consultants on site that can help you with innovation inside your company, that helps you boost your intrapreneurial capital, organisational change and unleash their full potential with CLAIN method in their hands, boosting your innovation speed and giving competition hard times.

Name: Home Deluxe GmbH
Description:
Home Deluxe ist ein mit Ostwestfalen verbundenes Unternehmen. Unser Kerngeschäft liegt im Online-Vertrieb von Artikeln rund um Haus und Garten.
Wir möchten zeigen, dass Qualität nicht gleich teuer sein muss!
Sie möchten sich davon und von der Vielfalt unserer Produkte überzeugen? Dann besuchen Sie gerne unseren Online-Shop (https://www.home-deluxe-gmbh.de) oder unseren Flagship Store in Minden. 

Unsere Geschichte
Geschäftsführer Alexander Thoss gründete das Unternehmen im Jahr 2009 mit der Idee, Deluxe-Produkte für jeden zugänglich zu machen. Der erste Arbeitsplatz war der Schreibtisch im Haus seiner Eltern und das Ursprungsteam bestand neben Ihm aus fünf Personen aus dem engsten Familien- und Freundeskreis. Aus der Idee ist eine Vision geworden, die wir bei der Weiterentwicklung unseres Unternehmens verfolgen.
Mittlerweile verzeichnet Home Deluxe ein kontinuierliches Wachstum in allen Bereichen: aus einer Handvoll Mitarbeitender wurde ein mittelständisches Unternehmen, das aktuell einen Jahresumsatz von ca. 80 Mio. € und mehr als 180 Mitarbeitende an vier Standorten, verteilt auf über 100.000 m² Areal im Unternehmen zählt. 

Unsere Visionen
Wir begleiten unsere Kundschaft von der Kaufberatung bis zur Auslieferung des Produkts und bieten somit einen lückenlosen „Rund-um-Service“ von der Beratung bis hin zur Auslieferung an.
Um unserer Kundschaft immer das passende Produkt anbieten zu können, erweitern wir jährlich unsere Produktpalette. Alle Mitarbeitende haben ein Stück dazu beigetragen, uns als Online-Anbieter zu einer etablierten und bekannten Marke im Bereich Wohnen und Garten zu machen. In Zukunft soll der Bekanntheitsgrad europaweit stetig erweitert und die Marke Home Deluxe in weiteren Bereichen fest etabliert werden.
Als hervorragender Arbeitgeber schaffen wir eine angenehme Arbeitsatmosphäre und erhalten trotz rasantem Wachstum ein familiäres und lebendiges Arbeitsumfeld mit flachen Hierarchien und kurzen Entscheidungswegen.

Description:

Compania beneficiază de o prezenta multinațională, investește continuu in dezvoltarea rețelei sale de vânzări, retail si corporate, urmărind diversificarea gamei de servicii în funcție de nevoile clienților săi corporate și retail. În prezent, compania are peste 30.000 de puncte de vânzare autorizate în România și își consolidează prezența multinațională în Ungaria, Bulgaria și Republica Moldova.

SCALA ASSISTANCE a intrat pe piața în anul 2007, aducând - în premieră pentru România - conceptul de vânzare online de viniete.

Deși activitatea principală a SCALA este emiterea și distribuirea de viniete pentru utilizarea rețelei de drumuri și autostrăzi naționale, începând cu anul 2021, compania a intrat pe piața asigurărilor auto și a serviciilor de asistență auto.

Activitatea de distribuire a vinietelor este autorizata de către Societatea Națională de Administrare a Infrastructurii Rutiere (C.N.A.I.R. S.A.) prin Contract 93/17339 / 27.08.2007 (actualizat) iar distribuirea asigurărilor auto obligatorii RCA este autorizată de Autoritatea de Supraveghere Financiară (ASF).

Moreover, our support center offers all customers the possibility to reach us around the clock. Name: asx.eu
Description:
Arbeitsschutz-Express! Die Profis für Berufskleidung mit der größten Markenvielfalt im Bereich Workwear. Hier wird Mode und Sicherheit groß geschrieben. Seit der Firmengründung im Jahr 1983 und der Gründung der Marke Arbeitsschutz-Express im Jahr 2006 stehen wir unseren Kunden und Kundinnen verschiedener Branchen als kompetenter Ansprechpartner im Bereich Arbeitsschutz zur Seite. Seit 2009 ist als weiterer Gesellschafter Philipp Wiedemann mit im Unternehmen. So basiert die Vertriebs- und Herstellerkompetenz des Familienunternehmens auf jahrzehntelanger Erfahrung. Unsere Kunden kommen aus den unterschiedlichsten Branchen wie zum Beispiel Industrie, Logistik, Bau oder Handwerk. 

Es ist unser Ziel, unsere Kunden und Kundinnen mithilfe hochwertiger Arbeitskleidung und Schutzutensilien vor den Risiken des Arbeitsalltages zu schützen. Unser Sortiment an Berufsbekleidung umfasst unter anderem Arbeitsjacken, Arbeitshosen, Handschuhe, Arbeitsschuhe und Helme. Dabei ist es unser Anspruch, Sicherheitsanforderungen mit einer ansprechenden Optik zu vereinen. Wir arbeiten stets nach aktuellen Sicherheitsvorschriften, sodass jeder für seinen Arbeitsbereich hochwertige Workwear findet – von klassisch bis locker.

Neben dem Schwerpunkt Arbeitskleidung umfasst unser Angebot weitere Produkte, die für sicheres Arbeiten notwendig sind. Von Atemschutzmasken über Schutzbrillen bis hin zum Chemikalienschutz erhalten unsere Kunden und Kundinnen bei Arbeitsschutz-Express qualitativ hochwertige Produkte, denn dessen Gesundheit ist unsere Mission. Ergänzt wird unser Angebot durch unseren Logoservice, der Berufsbekleidung mit individuellen Logos veredelt!

Sie sind an einer Mitarbeit interessiert und möchten Teil des Arbeitsschutz-Express Teams werden? Dann freuen wir uns auf Ihre Bewerbung! 
Informieren Sie sich auf: https://www.arbeitsschutz-express.de/karriere

Speel, leer, verwonder!

Name: VéloCertifié Créateur de Confiance
Description:
Aujourd’hui, lorsqu’un particulier souhaite acquérir un vélo d’occasion, il s’adresse :
- Soit à un PRO et il est complètement sécurisé sur la propriété et l’usage
- Soit à un PARTICULIER pour minimiser le coût d’achat mais la contrepartie est qu’il n’existe aucune garantie minimale !

Nous entendons par garantie minimale, une preuve de propriété préalablement à l’acquisition, un transfert de propriété postérieurement à l’acquisition, un marquage pour faciliter la recherche en cas de vol et enfin d’être assuré que le vélo est en état de fonctionnement pour la sécurité de l’usager acheteur.

C’est précisément pour sécuriser les transactions entre particuliers que VeloCertifie.com existe en alliant 2 types de relation :
- La relation digitale, avec une plateforme qui met en relation, qui trace la propriété, qui stimule l’acte d’achat et qui gère les parcours utilisateurs
- La relation physique, en positionnant nos artisans du vélo au centre du jeu, sur le marché de la seconde main.

Nous offrons 3 propositions de valeurs :
- Avoir une estimation du vélo en relation avec le marché
- Lutter contre la fraude et Promouvoir une utilisation sécurisée 
- Favoriser l’artisanat local
 
D’une situation actuelle où il n’existe aucune obligation, VeloCertifie.com permet aujourd’hui :
- Une transparence sur la propriété initiale
- Un Contrôle Technique réalisé par un artisan de proximité
- Un marquage du vélo
- Et enfin la généralisation d’un acte de cession pour le transfert de propriété

Kübler Sport is a medium-sized family business based in Backnang near Stuttgart, which employs around 60 people. With more than 35 years of experience in the industry, we have established ourselves as a reliable supplier of sports equipment as well as a technical service partner for sports facilities. Our customers range from sports clubs, municipalities and schools to fitness studios and therapists throughout Germany and internationally. As a well-coordinated team of dedicated employees, we live the spirit of sports in our daily activities.

In addition to worldwide sales and online shipping, Kübler Sportservices round off the service package. Sports facility planning, including installation work, inspection and maintenance work, as well as the safety inspection of sports facilities, are carried out professionally and with certified quality assurance by our in-house installation and service team. Outdoor sports facilities are also planned and equipped by Kübler Sport.

Kübler Sport offers international sales of sports equipment with worldwide references as well as local sales partners in selected markets. Multilingual staff with many years of experience in transports as well as customs and export documents are available to provide advice.

Regular external as well as internal controls guarantee a continuously high quality of our products and services. Name: Geedup Co
Description:
From West Sydney Australia to the world, Geedup represents the go-getters, hustlers and underdogs who don't take no for an answer. Since 2010, Geedup has been synonymous with street and hip-hop culture, and by putting community at the forefront, they are fuelled by a relentless determination to redefine what it means to be a successful brand. Geedup uses premium streetwear as the vehicle for this central ethos, with all of our drops gratefully selling out at times within minutes online. Geedup is for those who have faced closed doors and dead ends, only to break their way into the building and take over. More than just clothing, Geedup is a collective for those who have taken the road less traveled, or better yet, those who are carving their own path unapologetically - whether that be in music, the arts, sports, or anything in between. People not only purchase clothes and subscribe to the Geedup mentality, but many have since gotten the brand's logo permanently tattooed on them - a testament to the fiercely loyal community that has developed over the past decade.

We began in a garage in West Sydney back in 2010, printing shirts for the wider community that were inspired by gangster rap, graffiti, and crime families of decades past. A brick and mortar store was soon opened in the heart of West Sydney to great success, but the rapidly changing retail space directed us to change strategy and shut our doors. The brand took a year off to realign our focus and draw up a clear strategy on the whiteboard, before relaunching assertively in 2019. Two major changes defined the new era of Geedup: Everything would be sold online; and all items would be limited to one drop, never be restocked again. It worked. We quickly expanded exponentially, while products became highly sought after and consistently sold out.

Name: Tree2mydoor Business
Description:
For over twenty years, Tree2MyDoor has helped people and organisations give with life, not waste.
We are a Manchester-based nature gifting company that creates meaningful connections through living gifts that grow.

Our story began in family gardens where fruit trees and roses were sent to mark moments of love, remembrance and renewal. Today, those same values guide our partnerships with businesses across the UK and beyond, helping teams, clients and communities celebrate in ways that last.

Every gift we send carries life and purpose. A lemon tree for a new home. An oak to honour a milestone. A rose to remember someone loved. Each is sustainably grown, beautifully presented and supported by our lifetime MyTree care system, ensuring every recipient feels cared for and every gesture has lasting impact.

For individuals, we help restore meaning to gifting. For businesses, we turn corporate gestures into living symbols of appreciation, culture and sustainability. Our planted gifting programmes help organisations replace single-use merchandise with experiences that strengthen relationships and support environmental goals.

Trusted by brands such as Innocent Drinks, PwC and WWF, we design and deliver creative gifting campaigns that measure their impact in people, purpose and planet. With over half a million trees already planted through our customers and partners, our work continues to grow, season after season.

Let’s restore the meaning of gifting.
Let’s give with purpose and watch what grows.

Description:
Agora Models is a partnership to some of the leading businesses in the model building industry.

We have three simple objectives:
1. To produce premium quality models
2. To ensure our customers feel valued
3. To build a valued global modelling community

We 3D scan the original vehicles using cutting-edge laser technology to create intricate computer models. These are then inspected by the source company (e.g. Shelby American, Inc. checked and approved our GT500 Super Snake). It takes us four months of detailed design to get to this stage; another two months to create the precision moulds required (there can be up to 200 moulds per model, some weighing over a ton!). After six months of research and development, plus several hundred thousands of dollars spent, we're ready to start production.

Our market is the whole world and we seek partnerships with the best and most trusted companies in our supply chain. Our distribution operation delivers globally out of five hubs around the globe: Australia, EU, Japan, USA & UK.

We look for innovative ideas and fresh partnership agreements to bring a wide range of museum-quality models to the market.

Agora Models works with leading brands such as James Bond, Transformers, Shelby, Aston Martin, Jaguar and Boeing.

Name: Octopus Services
Description:
Notre mission est de simplifier le commerce en ligne pour les industriels et les consommateurs en permettant d’accélérer la diversification de l’activation digitale et l’expédition en 48h des marques du quotidien. 

Les changements d’habitudes de consommation (eco-friendly, traçabilité, seconde main, omnicanalité, livraison immédiate, E-commerce …) impliquent une agilité aigue pour les industriels afin de s’adapter à ce marché en perpétuel changement. Nous avons la conviction qu’il est plus efficace pour ces marques d’externaliser ces opérations techniques à des partenaires spécialisés tel Octopus Services. 

En parallèle, le phénomène commercial « marketplace » complexifie cette obligation de transformation digitale. D’un point de vue consommateur, la marketplace devient un canal de destination pesant ainsi 20% du E-commerce en Europe. Les retailers saisissent cette opportunité pour améliorer leur offre et leur coût opérationnel ce qui amène à une transformation de leur modèle digital vers un modèle hybride qui accorde de plus en plus de place aux revendeurs tiers (3P vs 1P) pour accélérer ce changement. 

Face à cette urgence économique, il devient impératif pour les grandes entreprises comme pour les enseignes E-commerce de faire appel à des partenaires extérieurs (3P) capables de leur apporter cette agilité et expertise opérationnelle qui leur fait défaut et ainsi exécuter cette transformation digitale. 

Pour ce faire, Octopus Services (acteur 3P) offre une solution de transformation digitale automatisée pour le développement en ligne des marques avec une spécialisation sur le canal marketplaces.

At Swell UK, we pride ourselves on being forward-thinking and ambitious, always seeking new ways to innovate within the specialist pet industry. Whether it’s pioneering new product ranges, investing in digital growth, or reimagining what a pet retailer can be, we’re building for the future.

Name: Narici
Description:
NARICI /naˈri.tʃi/

The Italian word "narici" translates to "nostrils" in English. It refers to the two openings of the nose that allow air to enter and exit, enabling breathing and the sense of smell.

We are a contemporary Italian perfume house based in Milan. Each fragrance is crafted from single-origin ingredients sourced across Italy and reimagined into modern olfactory stories. 

We are exclusively available on our website Narici.com and we ship globally from Italy.

PERFUME IN AN AGRICULTURAL ACT
Big fragrance houses develop captive synthetic molecules to make their perfumes hard to copy. Instead, at Narici, we source, and in some cases, develop bespoke high-impact natural essential oils and absolutes from single-origin Italian ingredients.

Our launch plans are based on the crop calendar, and our supply chain relies on the relationships with farmers and growers. We release a new perfume each month, as different materials are harvested and processed for the upcoming batches. Our releases are often limited because we have to wait for the next crop to make more perfume.

Description:
In unserer Familie ist die Kunst des Kochens eine Tradition, die über Generationen hinweg gelebt wird. Von unserer Grossmutter bis hin zu uns hat sich die Leidenschaft für köstliche Aromen wie ein kostbares Erbe durchgesetzt. Ihre einzigartigen Gewürzmischungen waren ein Geheimnis, das jedes Gericht in ein kulinarisches Meisterwerk verwandelte.

Heute setzen wir diese Tradition fort, indem wir ihre einzigartigen Rezepte in Ehren halten. Jedes Glas unserer handgefertigten Gewürze ist ein Tribut an ihre Hingabe und ihr Talent, verfeinert mit den feinsten Zutaten und gespickt mit der Essenz echter Leidenschaft für gutes Essen. Mit jedem neuen Kunden teilen wir nicht nur Geschmack, sondern auch die Geschichte und die Werte, die unsere Familie geprägt haben.

Entdecken Sie eine Welt voller Aromen und Inspiration, die Ihre kulinarische Reise bereichern wird. Von herzhaften Gerichten bis hin zu süssen Genüssen bieten unsere Gewürzmischungen endlose Möglichkeiten, Ihre Küche in eine Geschmacksoase zu verwandeln. Lassen Sie sich von der Magie unserer familiären Traditionen verführen und erleben Sie den Genuss, der unsere Familie seit Generationen vereint.

KLIK sviluppa e progetta il futuro aziendale avendo esclusivamente come riferimento centrale il cliente.

Klik è il megastore dell'elettricità specializzato in materiale elettrico, illuminazione, automazione, allarmi e sicurezza, telefonia e tv, hobbistica e fai-da-te, attrezzature, condizionamento e riscaldamento.
Il punto vendita è diventato un vero e proprio punto di riferimento del settore elettricità per la quasi totalità della Regione Lazio.
I punti di forza dell' azienda?
•	Gli orari di apertura
•	Il self-service o il selfservice assistito
•	La possibilità di acquistare in negozio o direttamente on line
•	Tecnici specializzati consiglieranno le migliori soluzioni per ogni esigenza.
Il punto vendita è aperto tutti i giorni, dal lunedì al sabato, con la formula no-stop, dalle 7 alle 20, domenica dalle 9:30 alle 13. Con 13 ore giornaliere di apertura continua, tra l'altro, viene definitivamente eliminata ogni possibilità di fila per i clienti.
Sia i professionisti che i privati all'interno del megastore possono scegliere: chi sa già ciò che vuole e anche dove trovarlo, nei 2.500 metri quadrati di Self-service, si serve da solo e passa direttamente alla cassa, con un ulteriore guadagno di tempo, oppure scegliere il self-service assistito facendosi consigliare dai nostri tecnici specializzati.
Tutto, in ogni caso, è regolato da un sistema di tickets salvacoda.

Il magazzino è completamente informatizzato e ogni commesso ha con sé un piccolo computer portatile interattivo.
I clienti, inoltre, hanno l'accesso telefonico diretto per parlare con il loro commesso referente.

L'acquisto, in ogni caso, si risolve sempre in una manciata di minuti. E il tempo, si sa, è denaro per tutti.

Name: Fooch's Sports Cards & Collectibles LLC
Description:
Paul D. Fucci, is the Founder and President of Fooch’s Sports Cards & Collectibles LLC. Fooch, his nickname since junior high school, has been collecting sports cards, including baseball, football, basketball, and hockey cards, for over 50 years. 

In 2008, he rekindled his love of baseball card collecting when he made his first of numerous  annual pilgrimages, with his wife Lisa, to Cooperstown, New York, the home of the National Baseball Hall of Fame and Museum. After he visits the Baseball Hall of Fame, he loves walking down Main Street in Cooperstown looking for baseball cards in several of the shops there. He typically comes home with dozens of baseball cards, mostly New York Mets and New York Yankees players, from the fifties to present day. 

After graduating from Rider College (now University), Fooch made a living as a corporate sales professional for over 25 years and earlier in his career he spent a decade in retail sales and operations management. He has decided to make the transition to becoming a fourth-generation entrepreneur, following in the footsteps of his great grandmother, grandparents, and parents. His great grandmother, an Italian immigrant, opened Fucci’s Italian Kitchen in 1910, one of the first Italian restaurants in Newark, New Jersey. While working and eating there for the first 17 years of his life, he learned valuable business lessons that impacted him both personally and professionally.

L'aventure commence en 1959, à Nantes, dans un garage, celui de mon grand-père.

Amoureux des belles mécaniques, il a consacré toute sa vie à les entretenir, à les réparer et à les restaurer.

Souvent confronté à un problème de filetage, ou à « un pas qui foire », il a toujours cherché et sélectionné les meilleurs tarauds, filières, filets rapportés, accessoires et autres outils aux dimensions introuvables … au prix le plus juste.

Héritiers de cette tradition, nous vous proposons aujourd’hui une sélection de ses meilleurs outils.

Si vous ne trouvez pas les dimensions et formes recherchées, consultez nous via le formulaire contact. Certains outils peuvent être réalisés sur mesure, sans nécessité de quantité minimale.

Pour une meilleure clarté et plus de transparence, tous nos prix sont indiqués en TTC.

Alors à vous, tous les professionnels rigoureux ou bien les particuliers passionnés, soyez les bienvenus à La Maison du Taraud.

Name: Peel Of Tea GmbH
Description:
Willkommen bei 7Tea - Deine Online-Destination für Tee-Exzellenz. Für leidenschaftliche Tee-Liebhaber und diejenigen, die ihre Reise in die Welt des Tees gerade erst beginnen, bieten wir mehr als nur eindimensionalen Geschmack. Entdecke die Komplexität und die Vielfalt, die nur bei uns zu finden sind. Tritt unserer Gemeinschaft bei und erlebe den Unterschied mit 7Tea.

Denn genau das ist unser Bestreben: Hochkreative, faszinierende Bio-Tees mit intensivsten Geschmäckern, bestückt ausschließlich mit den besten Pflanzen.

Nie wieder Kompromisse oder tausende Tees im Shop, sondern nur das, was unseren Kunden, also dir, gut tut und wofür wir mit unserem Gewissen auch stehen können. Wenn wir selbst einen Tee nicht mögen, fliegt er aus dem Shop. Dadurch erreichen wir eine hervorragende Auswahl und spezialisieren uns auf wirklich gesunde Tees.

❝Tee hat nicht die Arroganz des Weines, nicht das Selbstbewusstsein des Kaffees, nicht die kindliche Unschuld von Kakao. Im Geschmack des Tees liegt ein zarter Charme, der ihn unwiderstehlich macht und dazu verführt ihn zu idealisieren.❞ (Laotse) 

Für uns wie die Luft zum Atmen, sind wir davon überzeugt, dass nur die besten Tees in die Tasse kommen werden. Dafür Tees zu suchen, zu probieren und auch selbst zu entwickeln ist unsere Leidenschaft.

Plus, we source all of our products with your fur-babies in mind and deliver them to your door in a jiffy.

 Your Local Animal Shelter

What are you waiting for?

Fetch the love. Spoil your pet with a purpose.

Description:
Sou Inês Ferreira, fundadora da loja Pituka. Sou Engenheira Civil de formação, mas em 2012 a crise neste setor deixou-me sem trabalho.
 
Em 2014 com o nascimento da minha filha Vera, apelidada de a nossa "Pituka", decido iniciar este projeto (não imaginando o sucesso que ia ter!), partilhando sempre a minha paixão pela maternidade com outras mães.
 
Estamos no mercado online de calçado a mais de 5 anos.
Em finais de 2015 inicio a minha loja online com apenas um produto: o calçado carneira (um artigo artesanal) e hoje ofereço uma variedade vasta deste tipo de calçado.

Name: Elden TCG
Description:
Elden TCG est une entreprise indépendante basée à Cormelles le Royal en Normandie, dédiée aux jeux de cartes à collectionner : Yu-Gi-Oh!, Pokémon, Magic: The Gathering et Lorcana etc.

J’ai créé Elden TCG pour proposer une approche simple et sérieuse du TCG :
des cartes authentiques, un suivi rigoureux de l’état des produits, des envois fiables, et une expérience pensée autant pour les joueurs que pour les collectionneurs.

L’activité repose sur deux piliers :
– la vente de cartes à l’unité via Cardmarket, avec un contrôle précis de chaque référence,
– la vente en ligne de produits scellés et d’accessoires (boosters, displays, sleeves, deck box, classeurs, tapis de jeu…).

Mais le projet va plus loin que le commerce.

Autour d’Elden TCG se développe aussi une association dédiée à la communauté TCG locale et en ligne. Son objectif est simple : créer un cadre accessible pour jouer, apprendre, échanger et transmettre. Débutants, passionnés, compétiteurs ou simples curieux y trouvent leur place.

L’association permet d’organiser des rencontres, des événements, des tournois, des initiations et des projets pédagogiques autour du jeu de cartes, avec une ligne claire : inclusion, respect et passion commune.

Elden TCG, c’est donc à la fois :
– une structure professionnelle,
– une vision communautaire forte,
– et l’envie de construire, sur le long terme, un écosystème TCG sérieux, humain et durable.

Je développe ce projet avec une conviction simple : derrière chaque carte, il y a un joueur, une histoire et une passion qui mérite d’être respectée.

Elden TCG — Tous les univers, une même passion.

In 20 Jahren haben wir uns von dem kleinen Computergeschäft zu einer Gruppe gewandelt, die neben x-kom noch zwei weitere Unternehmen umfasst. Jedes präsentiert ein anderes Angebot, aber unsere Werte bleiben gleich. Name: TacVent
Description: We thank you for taking the time to look at the cop-invented and American-made TacVent, the first and only passive ventilation device that allows the unobstructed flow and release of heat through true separation, using actual space, not matter – no spongy, meshy, absorptive material or inflatable devices, both of which can be counterproductive. Testing has shown TacVent to lower body surface temperatures by at least 14.5°, its distinctly unique and patented design consisting of a corrugated and perforated panel of extremely soft and highly flexible, engineering-grade, hypoallergenic thermoplastic elastomer. A huge plus is that its design and material allow it to act as a cushion, profoundly minimizing blunt force trauma. Using Velcro, it is easily secured and removed with all armor carriers, front and back, the “hook” portion stitched to the TacVent, and the “loop” portion attached with high-adhesive backing to any material. Again, we truly appreciate you taking a look at TacVent, the only solution in body armor ventilation!

Name: Donkid
Description:
Donkid Srl è un'azienda digitale multicanale in forte espansione, specializzata nella vendita online di prodotti per la prima infanzia, ausili per l’incontinenza, prodotti paramedicali e per animali domestici con una vocazione aperta all’innovazione e alla diversificazione.

Fondata nel 2018, Donkid ha costruito un solido modello di business basato sull’integrazione strategica tra marketplace internazionali (Amazon, eBay, Cdiscount, Kaufland, Redcare/Shop Apotheke/Farmaline, Worten, TikTok Shop, Allegro, Empik) e una rete proprietaria di eCommerce verticali e generalisti, attivi in tutta l’Unione Europea e nel Regno Unito.

Nel solo biennio 2023-2024, Donkid ha registrato una crescita straordinaria, con un +230% nel 2023 e +120% nel 2024. Al centro di questo sviluppo c’è una visione chiara: diventare uno dei principali Digital Retailer italiani, portando qualità, affidabilità e specializzazione in segmenti di mercato in forte evoluzione.

L'azienda investe costantemente in nuovi progetti, nello sviluppo di Private Label e nella registrazione di marchi proprietari, cogliendo le opportunità emergenti in modo rapido e strutturato.

Crescita, apertura al cambiamento e ambizione imprenditoriale sono le leve che ci guidano ogni giorno, con l’obiettivo di conquistare nuovi mercati, ampliare il nostro portfolio-marchi e costruire una relazione di valore duratura con il cliente.

Ние се стремиме и успеваме да ги замениме пластичните производи со висококвалитетни производи од нерѓосувачки челик со врвна термичка функционалност (36 часа ладно задржување на пијалаците и 18 часа топло) преку нашата ексклузивна Triple Cool технологија.

Name: ILP GmbH
Description:
Die ILP GmbH ist ein seit 2012 international agierendes E-Commerce Unternehmen mit Sitz in Hamm, Westfalen. Wir sind ein aufstrebendes Unternehmen auf Expansionskurs, das Produkte aus verschiedenen Kategorien entwickelt und auf Plattformen wie Amazon, eBay, real.de und otto.de verkauft.

BRANDS THAT INSPIRE – getreu nach diesem Motto entwickeln wir unsere Eigenmarken stetig weiter. In den Bereichen Haushalt & Küche, Hochzeit, Heimwerkerzubehör, Büro- und Künstlerartikel, Geschenkartikel und Kinderspielzeug schaffen es unsere Produktentwickler gemeinsam mit unseren zuverlässigen Lieferanten neue Wege zu gehen und so immer wieder innovative Produkte zu entwickeln, die die Bedürfnisse unserer Kunden erfüllen. Trotz der breiten Produktpalette wird großen Wert auf eine qualitativ hochwertige Produktion gelegt.

Mittels souveräner Marktstrategien sichern wir stetige Prozessoptimierung und Wachstum hinsichtlich unserer Produkte sowie unternehmensinterner Faktoren. Innerhalb kürzester Zeit erzielte unser Unternehmen ein rasant wachsendes Produkt-Portfolio. Über unsere europäischen Vertriebskanäle bieten wir unseren Kunden eine Bandbreite von verschiedenen Produkten.

Durch ein eigenes Logistiklager schaffen wir es unseren Kunden über die verschiedenen Vertriebskanäle einen schnellen Versand zu gewährleisten.

Name: Ethico India
Description:
Ethico started as an online platform with the aim of making conscious living convenient and then added an experiential space in Goa.
We are devoted to building conversations and initiating action around the climate crisis. By sourcing sustainable and ethically produced food, personal care, homecare goods, upcycled goods, and furniture created from reclaimed wood, we are aiding a plastic free lifestyle, and enabling consumers to question their choices and their impact on the environment. We’re always on the lookout for like minded partners we call Ethiclan, so connect with us for collaboration.
So far, we have reduced plastic production of 60,000+ plastic units and counting! Perceiving the importance of individual impact and living more consciously after having picked up 10,00,000 kilos of trash from the Mahim shoreline, we realised that there are millions of others who are not afraid to make the tiny and sometimes big personal changes that will make a difference. So we consolidated our learnings into the making of Ethico to create sustainable lasting change.

Name: HyBuys
Description:
HyBuys-ի մայր ընկերությունը՝ Նետրեքս ՍՊԸ Գերմանիայի Առևտրի պալատի պաշտոնական անդամ է, որն ունի 20+ տարվա փորձ էլեկտրոնային առևտրի ոլորտում: Մենք ստեղծում ենք կամուրջ ՀՀ-ում ապրող գնորդների և եվրոպական(Գերմանիա, Իսպանիա, Իտալիա, Ֆրանսիա, Նիդեռլանդներ, Բելգիա, Ավստրիա) առցանց խանութների միջև։

HyBuys-ի միջոցով գնումների առավելություններն են՝

ավելի ցածր գները,
ապահով գնումները,
առաքման արագ կազմակերպումը,
առանց միջնորդավճարի ծառայությունը։

ԵՄ-ից դուրս ապրող յուրաքանչյուր ոք կարող է օգտվել HyBuys-ից՝ Գերմանիայից և Իսպանիայից գնումներ կատարելու համար: Մեզ հետ Դուք կարող եք պատվիրել ցանկացած իր, որը հասանելի է եվրոպական առցանց շուկայում։ Մենք կգնենք Ձեր նախընտրած իրը և կառաքենք այն ՀՀ՝ տրամադրելով 5% քեշբեք ամեն գնումի համար (բացառություն են կազմում flaconi.de կայքից կատարված կոսմետիկ միջոցների և օծանելիքի՝ 30,000 դրամը գերազանցող գնումները, որոնց համար գործում է ԱՆՎՃԱՐ առաքում)։

Մեր միջոցով կատարված գնումների պարագայում Ձեզ մնում է միայն ստանալ պատվերները՝ առանց որևէ բանի մասին անհանգստանալու։

Այլ կերպ ասած՝ հայբայե՛ք, խնայե՛ք և վայելե՛ք HyBuys-ի հետ, քանզի մեզ հետ անիրականն արդեն իրական է։

Chez rangement Sympa, nous croyons qu’un intérieur bien organisé est la clé d’un quotidien plus serein. C’est pourquoi nous vous proposons une large gamme de produits astucieux, design et accessibles, pensés pour simplifier votre vie et optimiser chaque espace de votre maison.

Boîtes empilables, organisateurs de tiroirs, étagères modulables, meubles pliables, paniers de rangement, solutions murales, porte-chaussures, range-accessoires, supports multifonctions… Chaque produit est sélectionné avec soin pour allier gain de place, style et durabilité.

Mais chez Rangement Sympa, nous allons au-delà des simples produits :
Nous vous accompagnons dans votre démarche d’optimisation de l’espace grâce à des conseils, des idées d’aménagement, des fiches pratiques et des inspirations déco. Notre service client à l’écoute vous guide dans vos choix et reste disponible pour répondre à toutes vos questions.

Nous mettons un point d’honneur à vous offrir un service fiable et rapide :
 Livraison à domicile
 Paiement sécurisé
 Retours simplifiés
 Nouveautés régulières

Rangement Sympa, c’est l’allié de votre quotidien pour transformer le désordre en harmonie, sans sacrifier le style. Parce que bien ranger, c’est aussi mieux vivre.

Name: tonton Schulranzen
Description:
Schulranzen mit Herz und Verantwortung

tonton steht für Schulranzen, die Kinder lieben und Eltern vertrauen. Wir sind ein junges Unternehmen aus Dortmund und entwickeln hochwertige, ergonomische und langlebige Modelle, die den Schulalltag bereichern – nachhaltig produziert aus bspw. recycelten Materialien wie PET-Flaschen und Fischernetzen.

Doch tonton ist mehr als nur ein Schulranzen. Mit unserem 1:1-Prinzip spenden wir für jeden verkauften Ranzen einen ähnlichen an ein Kind in Not. So fördern wir Bildungschancen und Chancengleichheit – ein Schulranzen nach dem anderen.

Unsere Werte: Qualität, Nachhaltigkeit, soziale Verantwortung und Individualität. Wir glauben, dass Bildung der Schlüssel zu einer besseren Zukunft ist – und möchten mit unseren Produkten einen positiven Beitrag leisten.

Besuche uns in der tonton-Welt und erlebe, wie wir Schulranzen und Zukunft neu denken.

au début de notre activité le service de livraison était disponible uniquement a Oran , aujourd’hui nous couvrons le territoire national.

livraison sous 24H OUEST-CENTRE 
livraison sous 24-48H EST 
livraison sous 72H extrême SUD
livraison dans l’heure (Oran)
 

K-ZONE est parmi les premier acteur de l’écosystème (E-COMMERCE) a avoir mis en place le service de e-paiement.
 

Nous visons à travers cette plateforme à promouvoir, en deçà des produits de marques internationales, les produits locaux, et la vision internationale de K-Zone permettra de promouvoir les produits locaux à l’étranger.
 

Nous sélectionnons soigneusement nos fournisseurs et attachons beaucoup d’importance à la qualité et à l’authenticité de leurs produits ainsi qu’à leur savoir-faire.
 

Avec k-zone.dz “Achetez en toute confiance!”, nous offrons à tous les Algériens une expérience d’achat en ligne excellente et sécurisée, des produits originaux et garantis, des marques reconnues et un service inégalé.

Name: MyFeld AG
Description:
Konsumenten wünschen sich frische Lebensmittel aus der Region, ehrlich und sozial produziert. Regional, nachhaltig und klimaschonend sind längst nicht mehr leere Worte. Gemüseanbau mit der Natur als Partner – krumm gewachsen und entgegen der Norm im Supermarkt. Jeder der schon sein eigenes Gemüse geerntet hat, weiss, dass es einfach besser schmeckt als Standardware. Aber in unserem heutige Leben haben nur wenige  die Zeit, um sich darum zu kümmern oder der Platz in der Stadtwohnung fehlt!

Hier kommt MyFeld.ch ins Spiel: Wir bringen dir deinen eigenen Garten ins  Wohnzimmer. Und dies in digitaler und spielerischer Weise.

Pflanze online Gemüse, Früchte und Kräuter. Du hast die Wahl aus über 30 Sorten, um dein eigenes 16 qm Feld zu bestücken. Über eine Webcam kannst du dann sogar dein Gemüse beobachten, wie es wächst. Den Unterhalt übernehmen wir für dich – unsere Bauern und Gärtner pflegen deinen Garten mit bestem Wissen und Gewissen. Sobald deine Ernte reif ist, liefern wir dir die MyFeld.ch-Box in regelmässigen Abständen nach Hause.

Name: Callegari | The Wine Room

Unforgettable wine tasting experiences, tailored wine selection with shipment directly to your door, as well as wine investment and storage, are their main services. With an extensive, in-depth knowledge of the region, Callegari  can help you organize unforgettable wine and culinary experiences. These include bespoke winery tours, exclusive wine tastings, private cooking classes, and much more!

A carefully curated portfolio of top-tier niche wines and new appellations offers a superior expression of the local terroir and outstanding cellaring potential. Callegari tirelessly updates the selection so that you always have access to the best and latest Tuscan wines, directly shipped to your home door.

Check out the current season selection!

Description:
