Golf Anaiak est née dans le Pays basque. 
Deux amis passionnés de golf et de nature partageant de mêmes valeurs de familles et de fraternité ont décidé de s’unir dans ce projet passionnant. Étant fiers de nos racines françaises et basques, le mot “ANAIAK” signifiant “frères” représente parfaitement notre ADN et nos valeurs qui sont notre socle commun. 

Implantés dans le Sud-Ouest, nous récupérons les balles de golf perdues dans les étangs des parcours, que nous nettoyons puis trions selon les marques, les modèles et leur gradation. 
Ces balles reconditionnées sont ensuite revendues en ligne via notre site E commerce. 
Notre démarche s’inscrit dans une logique RSE en dépolluant les étangs. Elle permet aussi aux golfeurs d’économiser tout en jouant avec du matériel de qualité. 
Pour un golf, cela permet de valoriser ses étangs, d’adopter une démarche écologique et de bénéficier d’un service gratuit.

Name: jules'Box
Description:
jules'Box ist eine Bastelbox für Familien mit Kindern im Alter zwischen 3 und 6 Jahren. 
Durch die Vorbereitung von Bastelprojekten für die Zielgruppe der Kinder im Kindergartenalter, können Kinder spielerisch gefördert werden.
Das Basteln unterstützt die Erreichung vieler pädagogischer Ziele, darunter Feinmotorik, Kreativität, Geschick und Fingerfertigkeit, Räumliches Vorstellungsvermögen, mathematisches Grundverständnis, Soziale Kompetenz. 
Dadurch, dass die Projekte bereits so vorbereitet sind, dass die Kinder direkt losbasteln können, muss die Durchführung von einem Erwachsenen lediglich noch begleitet werden. Dadurch wird Kindern gezeigt, dass sie durch ihre Handlungen Dinge selbst erschaffen können und das Selbstbewusstsein der Kinder gefördert. 
Außerdem ergibt sich für die Erwachsenen die Chance, stressfrei mit den Kindern ins Gespräch zu kommen und die Welt aus ihren Augen zu sehen.

Name: CLAIRE Home and Self Care
Description:
CLAIRE, benlik sevgisi, günlük rutinlere olan özen, doğaya ve doğala saygı değerlerini evde kişisel bakıma yönelik ürünlerle birleştiren bir yaşam markasıdır.
 
Biz, kendinizi keşfetme ve en iyi versiyonunuza dönüşme yolculuğunuzda yüksek kalitede ürünler sunarak değerli olduğunuzu hatırlatmak ve evinizde geçirdiğiniz zamanı güzelleştirmek istiyoruz. Kişisel bakımı, her anı özenle hazırlanmış bir ritüel olarak görüyoruz, çünkü inanıyoruz ki evde kendinizle geçirdiğiniz keyifli zaman iyi ve değerli hissetmenin altın anahtarı…

Doğadan aldığımız ilham ve el emeği ile ürettiğimiz CLAIRE ürünleriyle sürdürülebilir yaşamın ve kişisel bakımın bir arada olması gerektiğine inanıyoruz. Doğal ve sürdürülebilir hammaddeler kullanarak uzun ömürlü ürünler üretmeye özen gösteriyoruz. Her bir malzemeyi, hem cildiniz hem de gezegenimiz için en iyisi olacak şekilde özenle seçiyoruz. CLAIRE ürünlerini her kullanışınızda, kendinizi sevdiğinizi ve sürdürülebilir yaşamın farkında olduğunuzu hatırlamanızı istiyoruz.

Evdeki anlarınıza değer katan CLAIRE ürünleri, sadece konforunuzu ve farkındalığınızı değil, aynı zamanda içsel dinginliğinizi de destekler. Tüm duyularınıza hitap ederek enerjinizi yükseltir ve evinizdeki atmosferi zenginleştirir.

Name: BookMyKit
Description:
BookMyKit | Simplifying Hostel Life 

At BookMyKit, we are a team of passionate engineering students dedicated to solving a common problem newcomers face in Aligarh: finding affordable and hassle-free hostel room essentials. Our journey began with a mission to make the transition to hostel life smoother and more convenient for students from different cities and states.

The Problem
When students arrive in Aligarh, their first challenge after securing a hostel room is figuring out where to buy essential items like mattresses, buckets, mugs, bedsheets, and more. Local shops often charge exorbitant prices, and carrying all these items back to the hostel can be a significant hassle.

Our Solution
We offer three comprehensive kits – Basic, Essential, and Premium – designed to meet students' diverse needs and budgets. Each kit includes high-quality, carefully curated items that are essential for comfortable hostel living.

Basic Kit: Ideal for budget-conscious students, providing great value without compromising on quality.

Essential Kit: Our Essential Kit strikes the perfect balance between affordability and quality, offering a range of products to meet everyday needs with ease and comfort.

Premium Kit: For those looking to invest in superior comfort and quality, our Premium Kit features top-of-the-line items that ensure a luxurious and hassle-free hostel experience.

Our Mission
Our mission is to revolutionize the student experience in Aligarh by providing convenient, affordable, and high-quality solutions that simplify the transition to hostel life. Leveraging our technical expertise and firsthand experience, we aim to make settling into a new environment as smooth and stress-free as possible.

Follow Us:

Wir lieben, was wir tun. | Gutes für Land und Leute

Description:
Gres-Sassuolo.it è un 𝗲-𝗰𝗼𝗺𝗺𝗲𝗿𝗰𝗲 𝗱𝗶 𝗽𝗮𝘃𝗶𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗶 𝗲 𝗿𝗶𝘃𝗲𝘀𝘁𝗶𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗶 𝗶𝗻 𝗴𝗿𝗲𝘀 𝗽𝗼𝗿𝗰𝗲𝗹𝗹𝗮𝗻𝗮𝘁𝗼 𝗱𝗶 𝗱𝗲𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻. Ogni giorno vendiamo i nostri prodotti in tutta Italia, facendo arrivare i materiali direttamente a casa dei clienti. 

Operiamo principalmente nel territorio nazionale, isole comprese ma spediamo anche in Europa arrivando, anche in questo caso, all’indirizzo fornito dal cliente. 𝗜𝗹 𝘀𝗶𝘁𝗼 𝗻𝗮𝘀𝗰𝗲 𝗻𝗲𝗹 𝟮𝟬𝟮𝟬 𝗲 𝗱𝗮 𝗮𝗹𝗹𝗼𝗿𝗮 𝗲̀ 𝗶𝗻 𝗰𝗼𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗲 𝗰𝗿𝗲𝘀𝗰𝗶𝘁𝗮. 

Siamo una squadra giovane, preparata e al servizio del cliente. 𝗙𝗮𝗰𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗺𝗼 𝗱𝗲𝗹𝗹𝗮 𝗰𝗼𝗻𝘀𝘂𝗹𝗲𝗻𝘇𝗮 𝗲 𝗱𝗲𝗹 𝗰𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗼𝗺𝗲𝗿 𝗰𝗮𝗿𝗲 𝗶 𝗻𝗼𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗶 𝗺𝗶𝗴𝗹𝗶𝗼𝗿𝗶 𝗽𝗿𝗲𝗴𝗶. 

Ma questi non sono gli unici. 

Siamo 𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗶 𝗱𝗲𝗹 𝗱𝗲𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻 𝗶𝘁𝗮𝗹𝗶𝗮𝗻𝗼, del quale siamo profondamente orgogliosi. Abbiamo quindi creato un catalogo relativamente contenuto, pur avendo circa 450 prodotti. Questo per due motivi principali: non disorientare il cliente e garantirgli una qualità generale elevata. Non vendiamo per scelta prodotti di scarsa fattura o primi prezzi. 𝗧𝘂𝘁𝘁𝗶 𝗶 𝗻𝗼𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗶 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗱𝗼𝘁𝘁𝗶 𝘀𝗼𝗻𝗼 𝗶𝗻 𝗽𝗿𝗶𝗺𝗮 𝘀𝗰𝗲𝗹𝘁𝗮 𝗲 𝗠𝗮𝗱𝗲 𝗶𝗻 𝗜𝘁𝗮𝗹𝘆.

Ci troviamo a 𝗦𝗮𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗼𝗹𝗼, nel cuore del distretto ceramico più famoso al mondo. Non è il più grande ma è quello più evoluto ed è da qui che parte il design, al quale molti altri comprensori esteri si ispirano. La nostra location è importante perché ci permette di essere 𝗰𝗼𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗲 𝗮𝗴𝗴𝗶𝗼𝗿𝗻𝗮𝘁𝗶 𝘀𝘂𝗹𝗹𝗲 𝘁𝗲𝗻𝗱𝗲𝗻𝘇𝗲 𝗱𝗲𝗹 𝗺𝗲𝗿𝗰𝗮𝘁𝗼 𝗲 𝗱𝗲𝗹 𝗱𝗲𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻, oltre che ad essere a due passi da trasformatori, che permettono di creare con il gres porcellanato incredibili arredi e soluzioni di pregio. Queste possono essere scale, lavabi, piatti doccia e tanti altri elementi su misura.

Name: Pakwall
Description: PAKWALL.PK is an innovative venture launched by Pakwall (Private) Limited headquartered in Lahore, Pakistan. It is a marketplace and a community, aiming to connect people in all corners of the country and abroad. We are aiming to develop PAKWALL.PK as forum for all the Pakistanis living in the country or abroad, to meet their buying requirements efficiently and cost effectively. PAKWALL.PK is an initiative to cope the scorching issue, the need of hour, the nonconforming gap between the retail price (the value to be paid by the consumer) and the cost of production (ex-factory price), or the distribution price. Under prevailing supply chain, there are many phases / intermediary parties and also there is huge cost involved in each step of the process. The anomalous costs at retail setups, the extraordinarily high rents and utilities of the premises, the excessive branding, the selling and related costs, burden up the retail prices to the existing ever-increasing levels. With this initiative, we are aiming to minimize this price gap to the lowest possible and transfer the savings to the consumers. PAKWALL.PK is a platform connecting the growers / farmers, producers, manufacturers and the importers direct to the consumers, reducing the intermediary costs; the fruit of hard work to ones who really own and entitle. We believe; today, the consumers want to deal directly with one another, getting middleman out of the way. PAKWALL.PK is an online / e-commerce podium, enabling the supply chain process to circumvent the anomalous costs associated with the retail setups, ultimately sharing the cost savings to the consumers. Working efficiently under this initiative, we are aiming to assure a substantial savings, ranging from 20% ~ 25% on monthly spending by the consumers. All this target of benefit transfer, is well computed through the statistical calculations, not a vague or assumptive figure

Nous invitons chacun à participer à notre démarche ambitieuse visant à révolutionner le secteur des soins capillaires. En intégrant des formulations naturelles et innovantes, nous nous efforçons de promouvoir une approche holistique du soin des cheveux. Notre objectif est de créer une différence tangible dans la vie de nos clients, tout en respectant notre engagement envers l’environnement et la durabilité. Name: Australian Home Brewing
Description:
Australian Home Brewing (AHB), established in 1968 in Victoria, holds the pioneering title of the Australia’s first dedicated home brewing company. This inception occurred a notable four years before home brewing was legalized in Australia, marking AHB as a trailblazer in the industry.
Today, Australian Home Brewing remains a cornerstone of the home brewing community in Australia. Its journey from a humble garage operation to a leading supplier of brewing equipment, ingredients, and knowledge reflects its passion for brewing and dedication to fostering a vibrant, inclusive brewing culture. AHB's story is not just about beer; it's about community, innovation, and the shared joy of crafting something special at home. Cheers to all the brewers out there, from beginners to seasoned artisans, as we continue to brew, share, and enjoy the fruits of our passion together.

Name: MotoRacingShop
Description:
MOTORACINGSHOP TU E LA TUA MOTO AL TOP
Quello che leggi qua sopra è il nostro motto, con il quale abbiamo voluto esprimere in poche parole quello che MotoRacingShop rappresenta o rappresenterà per TE: un portale dove trovare facilmente ed al giusto prezzo tutto il meglio per TE e per la tua MOTO!

Siamo un negozio di MOTOCICLISTI per MOTOCICLISTI, quindi sappiamo cosa significa dover scegliere la cosa giusta o quella che fa al caso tuo. Lo scopo del nostro lavoro, anzi della nostra passione è proprio cercare di capire quello che ti serve, consigliarti senza secondi fini e risolvere la tua necessità proprio come se quella necessità fosse per un nostro amico bikers. Non siamo il tipico commerciante "furbetto" che vuole rifilarti qualcosa che conviene a lui o che ha fermo da anni sullo scaffale...

Nel nostro TEAM ci sono motociclisti che usano svariati tipi di moto: Stradali ed Ipersportive, Motocross ed Enduro, Moto da Viaggio o GranTurismo, quindi la nostra esperienza ti potrà venire in aiuto qualunque sia la tua esigenza o qualunque sia la tua tipologia di moto.



Non trovando niente che rappresentava questa filosofia, oltre 10anni fa, abbiamo deciso di realizzare il nostro shop, dove puoi trovare tutto per TE e la tua MOTO. Al momento sul sito sono presenti oltre 500.000 articoli delle migliori marche a prezzi molto vantaggiosi, a cui vengono aggiunti giorno per giorno le migliori novità uscite sul mercato. Siamo sempre sul PEZZO alla ricerca dei prodotti migliori e più innovativi!!! Tutti gli articoli sono o in pronta consegna o disponibili in tempi brevissimi.

Name: JAJU
Description:
Nasza przygoda z dmuchanymi atrakcjami rozpoczęła się w 2015 roku pod Biedronką! Wtedy to szukając pomysłu na kawalerski, przyszedł pomysł zagrania w piłkę w dmuchanych kulach Bumper ball (Bubble Football, Bubble Soccer). Obsługując rozmaite eventy z piłkami po pewnym czasie narodził się pomysł, aby kupić pierwsze dmuchańce i cóż… Nasz dostawca nasz oszukał i nie okazał się uczciwy, a my straciliśmy pieniądze. Dużo pieniędzy. Nie poddaliśmy się! Spróbowaliśmy jeszcze raz z innymi dostawcami i udało się! Wszystko było właśnie takie jak być powinno, a dmuchańce cieszyły się ogromną popularnością, dlatego też w następnym roku znów kupiliśmy kolejne!
Krok po kroku, zdobywając coraz większe doświadczenie w wynajmie dmuchanych atrakcji oraz dokupując kolejne dmuchańce ( całą naszą ofertę znajdziecie na www.funandplay.pl ) poznaliśmy tajniki tego biznesu na wylot, a w naszych głowach narodził się pomysł sprzedawania i pomagania osobom takim jak my kilka lat temu, bez narażania Was na ryzyko utraty pieniędzy, problemów z jakością atrakcji, gwarancją, dostawą oraz ukrytymi opłatami, o których kilka lat temu nie mieliśmy pojęcia, że w ogóle istnieją!

Teraz z czystym sumieniem możemy Wam oferować dmuchane zjeżdżalnie, zamki do skakania, skakańce z suchymi basenami, dmuchane place zabaw w różnych rozmiarach, tory przeszkód, dmuchane urządzenia do rywalizacji jak wipeout, parki rozrywki, parki wodne, atrakcje na wodę, a nawet dmuchane poduszki do skoków!
Masz pomysł na jakiś szalony dmuchaniec? Chcesz zmienić kolory danej atrakcji? Wszystkie nasze dmuchane atrakcje mają możliwość personalizacji i dostosowania do Twoich potrzeb!
Jeśli masz mały budżet, nie masz samochodu dostawczego i zależy Ci, aby dmuchańce wozić swoim samochodem osobowym i rozkładać ja samemu to wybór zamku o powierzchni 80 metrów kwadratowych nie będzie dobrym rozwiązaniem!
Służymy pomocą, radą, wsparciem, doświadczeniem, a przede wszystkim pasją do tego biznesu, którą z chęcią i Ciebie zarazimy!

Name: JONA SLEEP
Description:
Die JONA Marken- und Produktphilosophie lässt sich ganz einfach mit einem Wort zusammenfassen: Natürlichkeit. Wir setzen von der Naturlatexmatratze bis hin zu Baumwoll-Bettwäsche auf hochwertige Rohstoffe sowie eine schonende Verarbeitung, um Dir ein gesundes Schlaf- und Wohnerlebnis zu ermöglichen. Dabei spielt natürlich auch das Thema Nachhaltigkeit eine große Rolle. Hier möchten wir durch unsere Produkte einen wertvollen Beitrag leisten. Sie werden nicht nur aus nachwachsenden Rohstoffen hergestellt, sondern sind darüber hinaus auch sehr lange haltbar und problemlos zu recyceln.

Dieser klare Fokus auf Natürlichkeit ist für alle Mitglieder des JONA Teams eine echte Herzensangelegenheit, er schweißt uns fest zusammen. Zudem betrachten wir es als großes Privileg, das Zuhause vieler Menschen durch unsere Produkte mitgehalten zu dürfen. Das spornt uns jeden Tag aufs Neue an.

Name: eQuatorial GmbH | DRAKENSBERG
Description:
DRAKENSBERG haben wir gegründet, weil wir Menschen inspirieren wollen, den wahren Wert von Reisen zu erkennen und danach zu streben. Den Weg als Ziel zu begreifen und daran zu wachsen. Denn wir glauben, eine gute Reise kann ein ganzes Leben verändern.

Unsere Reisetaschen sollen Menschen an den Zeitgeist des 19. und 20. Jahrhunderts erinnern, als Reisen noch Abenteuer und Reisende Abenteurer waren. Die Reise, die unser Leben veränderte, führte uns vor fast 20 Jahren quer durch Süd-Afrika. Als wir mit dem Auto von Kapstadt bis in die Drakensberge fahren wollten. Und dort jedoch nie ankommen sollten.

AUTHENTIZITÄT:
Unsere Taschen sind handgefertigte Unikate, die noch wie vor 100
Jahren produziert werden. So entstehen Taschen mit hoher Qualität
und emotionalem Wert, der mit jeder Reise größer wird.

SLOW FASHION:
Unsere Stilistik entspricht dem Zeitgeist des 18. und 19 Jahrhunderts.
Wir produzieren wahre Klassiker, deren Design bereits Jahrhunderte
überdauert hat und Jahrhunderte überdauern wird. Und
das ist die einzig wahre Form der Nachhaltigkeit.

QUALITÄT:
Wir verwenden für unsere Taschen ausschließlich Premium-Büffelleder
mit einer besonders hohen Materialstärke. Qualität die man
fühlen kann. Wir verwenden für unser Oberstoffe ausschließlich
Baumwolle und verzichten grundsätzlich auf die Kaschierung mit
Kunststoff.

NATÜRLICHES MATERIAL:
Unser Leder wird hauptsächlich vegetabil, also mit Pflanzenteilen
gegerbt. Diese natürlichere Form der Gerbung schont Mensch und
Natur. Es ist gerade dieses Leder, welches unseren Taschen Ihren
unverwechselbaren Charakter gibt.

Name: kunstpark Gmbh
Description:
Künstlerbedarf seit 2000
Als einer der ersten Online Shops für Künstlerbedarf können wir auf mehr als 20 Jahre Erfahrung zurückblicken. 
Dabei war Künstlerbedarf schon immer mehr als Farben, Keilrahmen und Pinsel. Du stehst bei uns im Mittelpunkt – deswegen bieten wir Dir mittlerweile nicht nur sämtliches Malzubehör, sondern die ganze Welt des Kreativbedarfs in unserem Kreativ Online Shop.
Entdecke tolles Kreativ-Material und Zubehör zum Malen, Zeichnen und Gestalten – von den führenden Herstellern bis hin zur kleinen Manufaktur wird dabei Qualität ganz groß geschrieben - Aus Liebe zur Kunst!
Diese Qualität bieten wir Dir zu fairen Preisen: Im kunstpark Shop findest Du nicht nur professionelle Künstlermaterialien, sondern auch preiswerte Einsteiger-Sets für Hobbykünstler. 
Im kunstpark Kreativ-Shop entdeckst Du für jeden Anlass das passende Zubehör.
Wir leben und lieben Kunst. Wenn Du Fragen hast, beraten wir Dich gerne und kompetent bei der Auswahl – online oder in unserem Kreativ Laden in Herne. 
In unserem Geschäft finden außerdem Kreativkurse statt: Unser großes Team von Künstlern und Dozenten, die in Malkursen und Workshops neben Spaß und Unterhaltung professionell den Zugang zur Kunst und Gestaltung vermitteln, freuen sich auf Dich. Werde kreativ und lasse Deinen Ideen freien Lauf! 

Auch in Dir steckt ein Künstler! Mit dem richtigen Kreativ Material und der entsprechenden Motivation kannst Du künstlerisch tätig werden und Deine Ideen Gestalt annehmen lassen. Wir versenden Deine Bestellung so schnell wie möglich, falls Du Deine kreativen Ideen sofort in die Tat umsetzen willst – Du kannst schon in 1-3 Tagen loslegen (bei Lieferung innerhalb Deutschlands). Viel Spaß beim Stöbern im kunstpark Kreativ-Shop!

Name: Gerstaecker Schweiz AG
Description:
Gerstaecker ist Europas größter Versandhandel für Kunstbedarf. 

Neben einer enormen Produktauswahl bieten wir auch regelmässig unschlagbare Aktionsangebote, Anwendungstipps zu Produkten und inspirierende Blogbeiträge an. Als Unternehmen mit Tradition und über 50 Jahre Erfahrung im Versandhandel von Kunstbedarf, profitieren wir von langjährigen und intensiven Geschäftsbeziehungen. Unseren Einkaufsvorteil geben wir selbstverständlich an unsere Kund*innen weiter. 

Der Gerstaecker Onlineshop ermöglicht es unseren Kund*innen bequem und in aller Ruhe in unserem grossen Sortiment aus allen Bereichen der Kunst zu stöbern. Mit über 70.000 Kunstartikeln, günstigen Preisen, schnellen und kostengünstigen Lieferungen sowie sicheren Zahlungsmöglichkeiten bietet der Shop eine komfortable Einkaufserfahrung. 

Unser Sortiment umfasst nicht nur Mal- und Zeichenbedarf wie Pinsel, Papier oder Farben, sondern auch Zubehör für Grafik, Drucktechniken, Plastisches Gestalten, Architektur-Modellbau und vieles mehr. Auch individuelle Wünsche werden berücksichtigt. Die Rahmenwerkstatt im Mutterhaus fertigt Bilderrahmen sowie Passepartouts auf Mass an. 

Wir legen Wert auf innovative Artikel und halten die Produktpalette stets auf dem neuesten Stand. Durch die kontinuierliche Neu- und Weiterentwicklung der Produkte wird eine hohe Qualitätssicherung gewährleistet. 

Ob ein professionelles Malatelier eingerichtet oder ein neues Hobby gesucht wird, bei Gerstaecker gibt es für jedes Bedürfnis und Budget eine passende Lösung.

Name: TURDO MOTORS
Description:
Somos uma empresa especializada em consultoria automotiva e intermediação na compra e venda de veículos. Diferente das lojas convencionais, operamos em um modelo de negócio moderno e ágil, proporcionando aos nossos clientes uma experiência personalizada e eficiente.

 Nosso foco está na praticidade e na transparência, facilitando todo o processo de aquisição ou venda de automóveis.

Com uma forte presença online, utilizamos principalmente o Instagram como nossa vitrine principal, onde compartilhamos nossa seleção de veículos disponíveis e mantemos contato próximo com nossa comunidade de clientes.

Iniciamos nossa jornada em novembro de 2023 e desde então temos trabalhado incansavelmente para fornecer soluções sob medida para as necessidades automotivas de nossos clientes. Seja você um comprador em busca do veículo dos sonhos ou um vendedor procurando uma maneira eficaz de comercializar seu carro, estamos aqui para ajudar.

Conecte-se conosco e descubra como podemos simplificar e otimizar sua experiência no mercado automotivo.

Name: ONLINETRADE.RU
Description:
24 года на онлайн-рынке

Мы работаем с 1998 года, активно развиваясь и расширяясь. Мы не забываем о том, что высочайший уровень обслуживания – показатель того, что мы работаем действительно качественно. Поэтому на нас можно положиться.

Более 500 000 товаров на собственном складе

Мы не привозим товары с других складов, потому что обладаем своим собственным. В чем плюс? Вы заказываете, мы – доставляем. Без задержек. Точно по времени.

Мы не виртуальный интернет-магазин

В отличие от других интернет-магазинов, где нельзя осмотреть товар перед покупкой, мы предлагаем делать покупки осмысленно. В сети розничных магазинов можно проконсультироваться с продавцами, осмотреть товары и уже потом принять решение о покупке.  Если вы уверены в покупке, то всегда можете воспользоваться службой доставки или забрать товар самовывозом. В настоящее время в розничную сеть входит более 360 пунктов выдачи в 102 городах РФ. Ознакомиться с полным списком можно на странице «Магазины».

Простая и удобная система заказа товара

Мы знаем, как важна простая система регистрации и оформления заказа, поэтому делаем все для того, чтобы оформить заказ было удобно (и быстро!).

Оповещаем о состоянии заказа по SMS

Для тех, кто всегда хочет быть в курсе: вы сами можете контролировать свой заказ, получая статус о его формировании посредством sms-сообщений.

Каждый день мы обрабатываем более 15 000 заказов

Мы привыкли работать с большими объемами заказов, поэтому вам не стоит беспокоиться о том, что ваш заказ будет обработан не вовремя.

Оперативная доставка заказов

Вы всегда можете оформить срочную доставку. С нами вы не потеряете свое время!

Клуб ON-бонус

Программа специальных цен и бонусных баллов для клиентов нашего интернет-магазина. Участники клуба покупают товары, представленные в нашем интернет-магазине по более выгодным ценам, а так же накапливают бонусы и приобретают следующие товары ещё выгоднее!

Прямые контракты с ведущими производителями электроники и товаров для дома

Name: The Organic Sommelier
Description:
The Organic Sommelier is passionate about nature and wine. We have learned that many of the wines we love are organic or biodynamic wines, made by winemakers who have a passion for their craft and the environment.

We have been surprised and excited to discover how many winemakers now grow and produce in a responsible way, sometimes they don't even mention it on their label! From Bordeaux to Australia, winemakers are evolving.

Our new venture will bring  an ever changing and dynamic selection of organic and biodynamic wines from across the globe to consumers in the UK and we hope you will gain knowledge and pleasure from taking the journey with us. We have many experts from the wine industry share their knowledge and insight with all of us through articles and interviews that will throw more light on the continually changing world of wine.

What we love most of all is sharing the passion, the stories, and the culture of wine.

Name: Mystique Bazaar
Description:
Islamic Metaphysical Store | Where Mystique Meets Tradition

Our Islamic Metaphysical Store offers a unique blend of tradition and mystique through a diverse range of products. From the curated selection of books and gemstones to herbs, aromatherapy, and apothecary items, we cater to those seeking quality and authenticity in both spiritual and everyday wellness products.

Featuring some of the world’s most respected and longstanding brands, our store provides products that resonate with those who appreciate the balance of traditional values and contemporary needs. Whether you're on a spiritual journey or simply looking for high-quality wellness products, our offerings are designed to enrich your experience.

Our commitment to excellence and cultural authenticity makes us a trusted source in the growing market of wellness and lifestyle products.

Name: Véliv

Name: Kerftec
Description:
Bem-vindo à Kerftec, onde a precisão e a excelência se encontram para dar vida às suas ideias. Somos especializados em gravação e corte a laser de madeira, acrílicos, metais, entre outros. Cada projeto que realizamos reflete o nosso compromisso inabalável com a qualidade, utilizando sempre as melhores matérias-primas.

A Kerftec nasceu da paixão pela tecnologia encarando cada projeto como um desafio para transformar ideias em realidade. Cada etapa do processo é minuciosamente trabalhada para garantir resultados de máxima precisão e acabamento impecável. Name: Tabac Benden GmbH
Description:
TABAC BENDEN – TOBACCO CULTURE IN THE FOURTH GENERATION

Tabac Benden is a family-owned business based in Düsseldorf with a long-standing tradition in the tobacco trade. For four generations, we have been dedicated to cigars, pipes, and tobacco products – and have continuously evolved over time. In 1997, we were among the first in Germany to offer tobacco products online.

Today, we operate several specialized online shops, including Cigarworld.de, CasaBenden.de, Hacico.de, Rauchr.de, and Zigarrenwelt.de. Each platform is built on in-depth expertise, a wide-ranging selection, and reliable shipping.

• Our Range & Selection •

Our assortment includes cigars from over 1,300 product lines, featuring well-known brands from Cuba, Nicaragua, the Dominican Republic, and other countries of origin. Traditional German manufacturers and special lots such as factory overruns are also part of our offering.

In the pipe segment, we carry a broad selection of both series and freehand models, along with pipe tobaccos in various cuts and flavors. The portfolio is complemented by snuff and chewing tobacco.

We also supply smoking accessories like humidors, cutters, lighters, or pipe cleaners, as well as matching spirits – including rum, whisky, or cognac – to accompany tobacco enjoyment.

• Our Approach •

We value close customer interaction – whether in person, by phone, or email. Our teams provide objective and fair advice. Orders are shipped quickly and reliably via DHL and UPS, with Trusted Shops buyer protection.

Tabac Benden combines expertise with experience. We don’t aim to shout the loudest, but to be a knowledgeable partner for those who appreciate the careful selection of cigars and pipes.

Name: Mlle Marguerite
Description:
Chez Mlle Marguerite, notre mission est d'accompagner les femmes enceintes, les jeunes mamans et leurs nourrissons à travers une période de vie pleine de changements, d'amour et de découvertes. Nous croyons profondément que chaque maman mérite d'être choyée et soutenue, surtout durant ces mois si spéciaux qui entourent la naissance.

Notre Concept Unique :

Nos box par abonnement mensuel sont conçues avec amour et attention pour répondre aux besoins spécifiques des futures mamans à partir du 4ème mois de grossesse, puis continuer à les accompagner jusqu'au 6ème mois après la naissance de leur enfant. 
Chaque box est soigneusement adaptée au mois de grossesse ou au mois post-partum, pour fournir non seulement du soutien mais aussi de la joie et du bien-être au moment où elles en ont le plus besoin.

Pourquoi choisir Mlle Marguerite ?

 Produits Sains et de Qualité : Nous nous engageons à sélectionner des articles sains et sûrs, pour que vous puissiez prendre soin de vous et de votre bébé en toute confiance.

 Personnalisation : Chaque box est personnalisée selon le stade de votre grossesse ou post-partum, vous assurant de recevoir des produits parfaitement adaptés à vos besoins actuels.

 Économies et Confort : Recevez tout le nécessaire pour votre bien-être et celui de votre bébé directement chez vous, sans avoir à courir partout. Notre sélection minutieuse vous permet de faire de belles économies tout en découvrant des produits de qualité.

 Engagement : Nous sommes dédiés à l'accompagnement des mamans dans ces moments uniques, en promouvant le bien-être et la santé au cœur de notre démarche.

Ce que vous trouverez dans nos box :
•	Produits de soin bio et/ou naturels pour maman et bébé,
•	Articles de puériculture essentiels,
•	Accessoires de maternité confortables,
•	Petites douceurs pour chouchouter maman,
•	Conseils et guides pratiques pour vivre sereinement grossesse et maternité.

Mlle Marguerite - Chérir chaque moment, ensemble.

Hello! We are the two dreamers behind HappyNear, and we're so happy to welcome you to our story.

 It All Started with a Dream

HappyNear is so much more than a shop to us; it’s a seed of hope we planted after a long journey filled with challenges and trials. We've walked different paths, dreamed big, and stumbled along the way. But through it all, our passion for design and our desire to create something beautiful together never faded. That passion is what stands before you today as HappyNear.

 Why Wall Art?

We believe that the soul of a space is transformed by that final touch on the walls. An empty wall is a story waiting to be told, and our mission is to help you tell it with our modern and aesthetic metal wall art. Every piece is born from our personal taste, our love for art, and our desire to find that special detail that makes a house feel like a home. We design every item ourselves and partner with professional craftspeople who bring our visions to life, ensuring the highest quality for you.

 You're More Than Just a Customer

When you buy a product from this shop, you're not just getting a piece of decor for your wall. You're becoming a part of two friends' dream, supporting the growth of a small business, and helping that seed of hope to sprout. Your presence and support are our biggest motivation on this journey.

Once you support our small company, we will always be there for you! You can always reach us.

Thank you from the bottom of our hearts for sharing in our story and believing in us.

With love,
The Two Friends Behind HappyNear

Name: Bloomy Baby
Description:
En août 2020, je deviens maman pour la première fois, entre 2 confinements. Mon bébé plonge ses grands yeux dans les miens et je suis accro...

Devenir parent, c'est un immense bonheur, la plus belle expérience de notre vie, mais aussi un sacré chamboulement, on ne va pas se mentir !

Je n'avais qu'une seule idée en tête : trouver les meilleurs articles de puériculture pour mon fils. Les plus sécurisés, les plus jolis et surtout ceux qui l'aideraient le plus pour développer son autonomie et sa motricité. C'est vite devenu la jungle pour m'y retrouver et être sûre de faire les bons choix : que soit pour la belle aventure de la diversification alimentaire (et un peu stressante aussi), les meilleurs jouets de dentition pour le soulager ou encore pour faciliter nos (nombreux) voyages avec bébé !


A force de perdre des heures sur internet et en magasin à la recherche de perles rares, j'ai alors décidé de créer ma boutique en ligne. Un site cocooning, sans chichis, regroupant des produits de grande qualité, sécuritaires et design à la fois (sans oublier eco-friendly autant que possible), que je pouvais utiliser les yeux fermés avec mon petit chat !

Nous sommes là pour vous dénicher les meilleures trouvailles du marché

Notre but est d'aider tous les parents qui se sentent parfois un peu perdus face à tous les produits et conseils que l'on entend un peu partout (vous savez, les fais comme-ci ou fais comme-ça, on se comprend n'est-ce-pas ?). Aller à l'essentiel en ne proposant que le meilleur, c'est notre ambition ! On vous fait gagner du temps pour en passer plus avec bébé !

Name: Sighs Aps
Description:
Virksomheden er gundlagt af Kamilla Sølvsten Sigh i 2018 med et ønske om, at tage julepynt til the next level i Danmark. 
Med inspiration fra internationale websites så jeg et potentiale for at sprede min egen passion til Danmark. Stilen er ikke 'New Nordic', snarere more is more. Jo mere storslået, jo mere graciøst, jo mere ekstravagant des smukkere, er det for mig. Glimmer, glitter, bling, farver, lys … jeg elsker det.
Sortimentet er støt voksende med langt mere end 3000 forskellige julekugler. Alle  i mundblæst glas - og håndmalet. 
De fleste juleornamenter er produceret og hånddekoreret i Polen med et håndværk, der ligger til grund for hver enkelt kugle, der i sig selv er unik. 
Selv har jeg designet 'Minder om Århus' og 'Minder om København', dedikeret specielt til Smilets by og Danmarks hovedstad og alle os, der tilmed har gode minder om to dejlige danske byer.  
Husk at ikke alle kugler er runde. Kugler i alle shapes 'n sizes findes derimod hos mig; de originale, sjove og ekstravagante håndlavede glasfigurer i alverdens afskygninger – og mindst en personlig favorit til os hver især.
Jeg håber, du vil lade dig inspirere på SIGHs.dk.

Name: Benke GmbH
Description:
The family business Benke GmbH was founded in 2003 in Diepoldsau, a district of Rheintal, by a group of dedicated entrepreneurs and has remained in family hands ever since.
In its early years, the company focused specifically on the sale of disposable gloves and selected microfiber cloths—specialized and market-oriented, with a clear focus on quality and reliability.
Soon, demand for additional microfiber products began to grow, with a focus on mop covers, cleaning cloths, glasses cloths, and similar specialty items. This growth spurt motivated us to strategically expand our product range—for example, with exclusive microfiber cloths such as the dishcloth product, which we had manufactured according to our own specifications.
Parallel to the diversification of our product range, we consistently invested in the development and manufacture of premium cleaning products under the motto “100% Made in Switzerland,” a fundamental principle that still applies today and will continue to be pursued in the future.
With our own development and production facilities and a global network of partners, we were able to respond flexibly to special customer requests – whether in the private label sector or for specific microfiber equipment.
Since 2008, the company has also been based in Widnau – a move that has further strengthened our infrastructure and logistics in the Rhine Valley.
Today, Benke GmbH positions itself as a reliable partner in the field of microfiber textiles, cleaning products, disposable gloves, and cleaning systems – with a high degree of flexibility, individual implementation expertise, and a focus on sustainability and Swiss quality.

Name: Davos Energy LLC
Description:
Davos Energy is a dynamic, cutting-edge startup developing a portfolio of home energy mobile apps that put powerful, money-saving tools in the hands of homeowners.
In colder climates, home energy is a family's largest single-line-item annual expense. Our mission is to help homeowners cut energy costs by 25% through a two-pronged approach: (i) reducing consumption by improving a home's efficiency; and (ii) aggregating local companies' products, services, and pricing on a single dashboard so a homeowner can effortlessly identify the least expensive provider that matches the homeowner's needs.

Our first app, Heat Fleet (https://www.heatfleet.com), is an online marketplace for homeowners to price-compare and place orders with local home heating fuel dealers. Our second app, still in the design phase, will be a comprehensive guide to professional and DIY projects that boost a home's energy efficiency.

Davos' executive team has combined experience in strategic management consulting, digital marketing, and investment management. Our in-house development team consists of expert, seasoned full-stack software engineers.

Name: charis/me
Description:
Charis/me wurde 2022 in Berlin gegründet mit der Idee Menschen eine Plattform zu bieten, um Ihrer Individualität und Charisma Raum zu geben. Als erster Schritt liegt hierfür unser Fokus auf zeitlosen Ohrschmuck für jede Lebensphase.
Aus zwei Gründen:
Zu allererst bietet Ohrschmuck die Möglichkeit dezent Akzente zu setzen und die Einzigartigkeit durch kleine Details mit großer Wirkung  zu unterstreichen.
Zudem wurde die Lücke zwischen preiswerten, häufig qualitativ als auch ästhetisch simplen Piercing-Schmuck und sehr teuren high-end Piercings zu schließen, um dir eine kuratierte Auswahl an wertigen Ohrringen zu fairen Preisen zu liefern, damit du deiner Kreativität freien Lauf lassen kannst. 
Dabei hatten wir im Hinterkopf, dass Ohrschmuck soviel mehr ist als “nur” ein Ohrring und sich genauso ständig weiterentwickelt, wie du dich. Durch charis/me kann dein Stack immer wieder durch einzigartige Teile wachsen, um deine ganz eigene Persönlichkeit  und Charisma zu unterstreichen, ohne permanent zu sein, aber dennoch dir den notwendigen Gestaltungsraum zu liefern genau, dass der Welt zu zeigen was du sie sehen lassen möchtest.
Wir wollen hierbei, aber nicht einfach “nur ein” Shop sein, sondern eine aktive Community, welche sich gegenseitig inspiriert und empowered! Ganz der Definition von Charisma entsprechend; eine Vision vermitteln, Vorbildfunktion wahrnehmen und Stärken gemeinsam weiterentwickeln. 

curated  Piercings with

Chaque personne a le droit d'avoir un moment de d'apaisement dans sa journée.

- LA COSMÉTIQUE RASSURANTE -

On ne compte les cosmétiques sains et biologiques et pourtant les consommateurs restent méfiants à l'égard de tous ces produits. Passionnance propose des cosmétiques 100% transparent que ce soit en terme de conception, production ou de prix. Chaque personne doit avoir accès à l'information. 

- LA COSMÉTIQUE RESPONSABLE -

Les cosmétiques passionnance sont créés en accord avec les principes de la chimie verte. Ces principes indispensables au respect de l'environnement sont appliqués dès la sélection des matières premières jusqu'à la livraison de vos produits. Chaque personne doit pouvoir contribuer au respect de notre belle planète.

Name: HoldFastPro
Description:
Our goal was to build an easy-to-use, boat phone holder. We wanted our cell phone holder to have a secure Hold and Fast access to our cell phone and be able to take advantage of the rich experience that boating & fishing provide.

Too often, we found our cell phone in the cup holder, right where our drinks should be.  Or in the cubby, doing nothing but rattling around.  Or in our pocket.  Or worse yet….

With our adjustable cell phone holder for boats, your cell phone is always right where you want it.  Send a quick message, change your tunes, or turn on the selfie mode and hit record to capture important moments!  We have you covered!

The cell phone holder has dual adjustability.  You can adjust the strap to fit almost any pole and adjust the phone holder to fit most cell phone cases and cell phone brands. 

No tools are needed for this easy-to-install boat cell phone holder and has no pieces to rust. Each cell phone holder has two heavy-duty Velcro straps to secure most round poles.  Slip the cell phone in or out of the phone holder.   Slip out, use it, and slip it back when we are done, all with 1 hand.

Though HoldFastPro was born while creating the best cell phone holder for boats, we have found endless possibilities to secure our adjustable cell phone holder too!

Name: Heartwarming Treasures
Description:
Hello and Welcome to Heartwarming Treasures,
Here you’ll find our thoughtful team of entrepreneurs, artists, and innovators working together to create gifts as individual as the people who receive them.

Ours is a story of dedication and encouraging people to show appreciation, gratitude and thoughtfulness by giving gifts that surprise and delight others.

36 years of thoughtful gift giving
In 2025, we’re celebrating 36 years of thoughtful gift giving. We are delighted to partner in the success of individuals and businesses looking to give an extra-special gift to their friends, family, clients and employees.

Gifts wrapped with care and heart
Heartwarming Treasures began in 1989 with creativity and the dream of designing handcrafted gifts wrapped with such care and heart that everyone would be delighted.

We chose the name Heartwarming Treasures for its warmth in gift giving and our desire to create one-of-a-kind gifts for friends, family and neighboring businesses in Marysville, WA.  In the decades that followed we grew from a small start-up with big dreams to a wholesaler that assembled gifts for larger companies to a fan base of delighted customers who share our gifts and inspire us to create an amazing array of personal and business gifts.

Today, our handcrafted gifts are personally delivered to homes and businesses from Arlington to Auburn and Seattle to Snoqualmie and all areas in throughout the greater Seattle area.

Our delight is in the details
We didn’t set out to become the largest gift company, just the one who cares about the quality of its gifts and its customers. We delight in the details by carefully listening to our customers to understand their gift needs and design gifts based on their requirements and budget.

We thoughtfully arrange Northwest gourmet food with durable items wrapped in containers people treasure and re-use long after the contents have been enjoyed.

Name: The Neurospicy Shop
Description:
We aim to help you discover and develop your uniquely qualified mind. 

We are a community of kids, families, and adults whose brains are wired a little differently than the people that a lot of the world is designed for. We’re proud of our neurodiversity - our ADHD, our autism, our dyslexia, and our other conditions - and we are dedicated to learning how to thrive without sacrificing what makes us, us. 

On our site, you’ll find helpful, educational content with real-world tips that adults can use for themselves and to advocate for the neurospicy kids and teens in their lives. Our shop features products that we’ve curated to help us “neurospicies” adapt our world to work better for us. Our subscription box combines those two pieces - each box includes helpful products plus educational content about why we chose those products and how you can use them to enhance your life.

Name: Rozai Traders
Description:
Welcome to Rozai Online Shopping, where Tradition Meets Technology in the Heart of Nepal! 

Our Journey:
Established in 2021 by the visionary Arbinda Mahato, Rozai Online Shopping has been a driving force in reshaping the e-commerce landscape in Nepal. What started as a vision to combine the best of traditional values with modern convenience has now evolved into a thriving online marketplace.

Founder's Vision:
Arbinda Mahato, the proud owner of Rozai, envisioned a platform that goes beyond transactions. It's a celebration of Nepal's rich culture, a fusion of tradition and technology that brings a unique online shopping experience to the fingertips of every Nepalese consumer.

Key Pillars of Rozai:

 Curated Diversity: Rozai takes pride in offering a curated selection of products that span the spectrum of Nepal's diverse offerings. From traditional handicrafts to contemporary gadgets, we bring you the best of both worlds.

 Customer-Centric Approach: At Rozai, customer satisfaction is at the core of everything we do. Our user-friendly interface ensures a seamless shopping experience, complemented by prompt deliveries and responsive customer support.

 Local Empowerment: Rozai is not just a marketplace; it's a platform for local businesses to thrive in the digital era. We empower small and medium-sized enterprises, helping them reach a wider audience and contribute to the economic growth of Nepal.

 Innovation in Every Transaction: With cutting-edge e-commerce technology, Rozai brings innovation to every transaction. Personalized recommendations, secure payment gateways, and efficient logistics are just a few ways we enhance your online shopping journey.

 Community Engagement: Beyond being a platform, Rozai engages with the community through social initiatives, promotions, and events. We believe in giving back and celebrating the spirit of Nepal with every customer.
#RozaiOnlineShopping #EcommerceInnovation #NepaleseCultureInDigitalAge

Name: youngle GmbH
Description:
Youngle steht für hochwertige, wissenschaftlich fundierte Produkte im Bereich Gesundheit und Langlebigkeit. Unser Fokus liegt auf innovativen Lösungen wie Nicotinamidmononukleotid (NMN) und Nicotinamidribosid (NR), die die Zellgesundheit fördern, Energie steigern und die Lebensqualität verbessern.

Unsere Produkte und Dienstleistungen:

Premium-Produkte: Hochreine NMN- und NR-Produkte für Vitalität und Zellregeneration.
Strenge Qualitätskontrollen: Alle Produkte werden in unabhängigen Laboren auf Reinheit und Wirksamkeit geprüft.
Wissenschaftliche Basis: Kontinuierliche Weiterentwicklung basierend auf aktuellen Erkenntnissen der Langlebigkeitsforschung.
Kundensupport: Professionelle Beratung und Betreuung für individuelle Gesundheitsziele.
Unser Ziel ist es, Menschen dabei zu unterstützen, ein gesundes, energiegeladenes und erfülltes Leben zu führen. Mit einem starken Fokus auf Qualität und Transparenz arbeiten wir daran, die Zukunft der Gesundheitsbranche mitzugestalten.

Besuchen Sie uns auf www.youngle.com und erfahren Sie mehr über unsere Mission, unsere Produkte und unsere Leidenschaft für Gesundheit.

Powstają one w oparciu o najnowocześniejsze osiągnięcia naukowe i technologiczne oraz spełniają najwyższe standardy jakościowe. 

Ponadto Mito-Pharma oferuje również złożone preparaty ortomolekularne niemieckiej firmy Intercell Pharma, a także postbiotyki Molkur, opracowywane na podstawie oryginalnej i tradycyjnej receptury dr. Sandersa. 

Jednakże jej działalność na tym się nie kończy. Firma ambitnie działa również w temacie propagowania wiedzy z zakresu medycyny mitochondrialnej. Organizuje konferencje naukowe, stworzyła specjalistyczny portal internetowy mito-med.pl oraz wydaje literaturę fachową poświęconą zagadnieniom mitochondrialnym.

Name: GreenBirdi
Description:
92% of Canadians want to shop sustainably, yet 78% can’t tell which brands are truly sustainable. GreenBirdi is Canada’s first woman-led, cross-generational e-commerce marketplace solving this problem—connecting conscious consumers to verified Indigenous, women-led, and underrepresented brands.

Every product is pre-vetted through our proprietary CURESG + CARES frameworks, ensuring zero greenwashing, toxin-free ingredients, and cultural authenticity. By reinvesting 2% of EBITDA directly into undercapitalized women- and Indigenous-owned businesses, we’re creating a circular economy of trust, equity, and empowerment—showing that business can be done in a good way.

GreenBirdi exists to advance long-term systemic economic and social change by operating with integrity, prioritizing social responsibility, and improving the well-being and equality of women, Indigenous peoples, and other marginalized groups.

Early traction:

- Secured $500K in friends & family/founder funding
- Launched 80+ sustainable products on our site

Name: MyClever.Life
Description:
Op de webshop van MyClever.Life vindt je allerlei producten om je leven een stuk slimmer, veiliger en comfortabel te maken. 
Al onze producten en merken werken op het bekende Tuya Smart platform. Met deze handige Tuya Smart app stel je gemakkelijk geautomatiseerde programma's in en beheer je apparaten op afstand. 

Slimme producten van MyCleverLife.nl communiceren via Wifi of Zigbee en zijn binnen een paar stappen te koppelen aan je thuis netwerk. Voor apparaten die met het Zigbee communicatie protocol werken heb je een Zigbee Gateway nodig voor de koppeling met het internet. 

De intuïtieve Tuya Smart of SmartLife App is ontwikkeld om gemakkelijk een compleet smart home in te stellen en te beheren. Met slimme suggesties voor geautomatiseerde programma's of handige plug-ins om apparaten te schakelen op tijd of weersomstandigheden hoef je geen programmeur te zijn. 

Op MyCleverLife.nl vindt je betaalbare producten om je huis en/of kantoor te automatiseren, verduurzamen of te beveiligen. 
Denk hierbij aan:
- Slimme camera's
- Slimme stekkers
- slimme schakelaars
- Slimme sensoren (oa temperatuur, beweging, trilling, rook)
- Slimme deursloten
- Slimme verlichting
- Slimme verwarming/airco
- Smart Home Controllers

Alle producten van de diverse bekende merken werken allemaal op de Tuya SmartLife App. 

Creëer meer comfort met Tuya SmartLife
Bespaar energie met Tuya SmartLife
Stel je eigen beveiligingsniveau in met Tuya SmartLife

Kijk snel op onze webshop (www.mycleverlife.nl) 

Laat je inspireren en maak je leven zo slim als je zelf wil.

Name: SVE İÇ VE DIŞ TİCARET LTD. ŞTİ.
Pure Steed
Description:
Pure Steed is pioneering true innovation in equine grooming by developing ‘Microbiome-Friendly’ formulas, thanks to the revolution in microbiome science, accessing two decades of scientific studies and clinical results.

This science has forever altered our understanding of the skin... and it’s very exciting. We now know that skin health and the microbiome play a vital role in our horses' immune system where bacteria and skin cells are in constant conversation to reinforce and repair the skin-barrier and bolster the body's defence against infection and inflammation.

While we think of bacteria as invisible villains, your horse's body is actually teeming with bacteria heroes.

Your horse's skin is host to trillions of various microbes such as bacteria, fungi, and viruses. It is believed there are close to 2000 different species of bacteria on an equine's skin with approximately one million bacteria per square centimetre of flesh.

These microbes or microorganisms are called the microbiome and they live in harmony on the skin forming a vital barrier between the outside world and your horse’s internal structure.

We developed BiomeAID EQ our own premium blends of bio-ferments containing metabolites and fragments of probiotic cells to support your horses' complex skin-biome ecosystem.

When you use Pure Steed you can trust that we only use the most innovative and scientifically proven active ingredients, in high concentration for maximum efficiency.

After endless rounds of formulation, and years of researching the microbiome and sourcing the most outstanding and effective ingredients, we bring you Pure Steed, raising the bar in luxury, premium-quality formulas - that won't hamper your horses' natural defence system.

Filiale d'eMotion Tech SARL, fabricant français d’imprimantes 3D professionnelles basé à Blagnac, Reprap France partage la même vision : rendre l’impression 3D accessible, fiable et durable.

Notre boutique en ligne s’adresse aussi bien aux particuliers, aux établissements de formation , qu’aux entreprises recherchant des matériaux performants et éprouvés.

Nous sélectionnons rigoureusement nos produits pour leur qualité, leur constance et leur compatibilité avec la majorité des imprimantes 3D du marché.

Historiquement, Reprap France est née de la communauté Reprap, un mouvement open-source visant à démocratiser la fabrication additive.
Fidèles à cet esprit, nous mettons un point d’honneur à favoriser le partage de connaissance et à soutenir les utilisateurs dans leurs expérimentations et projets.

En collaboration avec eMotion Tech, nous nous engageons à promouvoir une production plus responsable :
- vente de filaments recyclés ou biosourcés,
- réduction des emballages plastiques,
- et soutien aux marques européennes qui partagent nos valeurs.

Notre mission : 
Faciliter l’accès à des consommable fiables, durables et performants, tout en accompagnant chaque utilisateur dans son évolution, du premier essai à la maîtrise complète de l’impression 3D.

Name: La vitamine C de Sicile
Description:
Les citrons proposés par "Les Parfums de Sicile" proviennent directement des vergers de Sicile, réputés pour la grande qualité de leurs fruits. Ils sont juteux, parfumés et apportent une saveur rafraîchissante à de nombreux plats et boissons. 

Le miel proposé est également un produit de choix, issu des ruches installées dans les vastes paysages siciliens. Ce miel est récolté avec soin et offre une palette de saveurs unique, provenant des différentes fleurs butinées par les abeilles.

Enfin, l'huile d'olive de "Les Parfums de Sicile" est produite à partir des olives de la région, pressées à froid pour préserver toutes leurs qualités nutritionnelles et gustatives. C'est une huile d'olive de grande qualité, idéale pour agrémenter vos plats et apporter une touche méditerranéenne à votre cuisine.

En résumé, "Les Parfums de Sicile" propose une sélection de produits authentiques et de grande qualité, directement issus des terres siciliennes. Leurs citrons, miel, olives et huile d'olive sont le fruit d'un savoir-faire ancestral, transmis de génération en génération. Que ce soit pour cuisiner, savourer ou offrir, les produits "Les Parfums de Sicile" sauront satisfaire les amateurs de saveurs siciliennes.

Name: Oshadhi USA Inc
Description:
Passion for Nature 
  Essential Oils / Hydrosols / Organic Body Care
  Enhance your daily life with Ayurvedic blends, wellness and body care products. 
                We are Oshadhi

Sharing precious gifts of nature, Oshadhi aims at providing access to the widest possible range of aromatic substances from the botanical treasures of nature – and through this contribute to individual and collective health and well-being.

Oshadhi's name originates from Sanskrit meaning "Carrier of Light" Through photosynthesis, the transformation of sunlight into energy and plants form the basis of all life on our planet. Oshadhi has a deep gratitude toward Nature, and it is close to our hearts to have available these precious gifts to enhance the wellbeing of people around the world.

The Oshadhi brand has been present in over 40 years countries and for more than 30 years. The enthusiasm and love for essential oils, founder, Dr Malte Hozzel (aromatherapist, entrepreneur and author) has traveled the world to ensure uncompromising quality 100% natural Oshadhi products.  This is the Spirit of Oshadhi.

Dr Malte Hozzel expertise in medicinal plants as well as his holistic approach to aromatherapy incorporates everything: the laws of biochemeisty, ancient wisdom of medicinal plants and of course, the understanding of the olfactory influences on the human body and the psyche.

Oshadhi Essential oils, hydrosols and organic skin care products can influence your life through the energy in the bottles. We are excited to bring these products to the US market.

Keeping to what Nature has made, Oshadhi is 100% Natural. Oshadhi does not use synthetic additives or other preservatives such as alcohol. Plus, most of our products are certified organic.

Whether it's a storybook that mirrors a child’s background or a doll that features natural hair and skin tones, our products are designed to send a clear message:

Name: SilverSavvy LLC
Description:
Welcome to SilverSavvy, a pioneering platform set to launch in June 2024, uniquely designed for those over 60. Our founder, Laura Lynn Morrissey, recognized a significant gap in the market – there simply wasn't a holistic, age-inclusive e-commerce and information platform addressing the distinct needs and aspirations of the senior community. SilverSavvy is our response to this unmet need, offering more than products and services; it's a commitment to enriching the aging experience.

Our Mission
SilverSavvy's mission is to empower those over 60 with resources that promote an active, connected, and fulfilling lifestyle. We acknowledge the frustration caused by the lack of targeted solutions in the market and are dedicated to bridging this gap with our tailored offerings.

Our Offerings

Active Living: Engaging physical and outdoor activities for those seeking adventure and fitness.
Wellness: Comprehensive health solutions addressing physical, mental, and emotional well-being.
Tech Savvy: Easy-to-use technology to keep our community connected and informed.
Lifestyle: A variety of products and services catering to hobbies, interests, and daily enjoyment.
Adaptive Living: Innovations for individuals with specific physical or cognitive needs.
Dementia Support: Specialized resources and products for those requiring memory care.
Building a Community
At SilverSavvy, we're more than a platform; we're a community. Our goal is to create a space where individuals over 60 can find not just products and services, but also support, information, and connection.

A Call to Action
We understand the challenges and frustrations of finding age-appropriate resources and solutions. SilverSavvy is here to fill that void, ensuring that the journey through the later years is as enriching and fulfilling as every other phase of life.

We invite you to join us in this exciting new venture. For more information and to stay informed about our launch and offerings, please visit www.silversavvy.com.

Established in 2019 and based in the Northwest of England, Tec-It-Out UK began with a clear vision: to supply high-quality refurbished computer equipment at the most affordable costs. Our mission is to give technology a second life, ensuring that individuals and businesses across the UK have access to reliable tech solutions while making a positive impact on the environment.

Our Journey:
Starting our journey on eBay, we have experienced significant growth as a business, expanding onto various online platforms. However, with the establishment of our website, we've taken a step further to enhance the customer experience. Dealing with us directly through our website negates the challenges of selling on third-party platforms. This direct approach allows for streamlined processes, quicker resolution of issues, and a more personalized customer experience. Moreover, without the burden of high fees charged by other platforms, we're able to pass on further savings to our valued customers, ensuring they receive the best value for their money.

Our Team:
At Tec-It-Out UK, our strength lies in our well-established and knowledgeable team. With experience spanning across all sectors of the IT industry, we bring a wealth of expertise to the table. Our team boasts Apple certified, ACMT technicians as well as time-served board repair specialists. Ensuring the utmost data security for our clients, all our staff members undergo rigorous security vetting. One of our core principles is self-reliance; everything is done 'in-house', ensuring quality control and a seamless experience for our customers.

We believe that fashion, art, and artisanal craftsmanship transcend borders, connecting people on a global scale. As avid travelers and cultural enthusiasts, we found ourselves constantly inspired by the treasures we discovered during our journeys around the world. From the intricate jewelry of the Middle East to the exquisite textiles of Asia, and the culinary delights of Europe, we knew we had to share these unique finds with the world. Thus, Mashallah Lifestyle was founded as a platform to celebrate and curate the best of multicultural living.

Our Vision:

At Mashallah Lifestyle, we envision a world where cultural appreciation is more than just a trend; it's a way of life. We believe that by embracing the beauty of diversity, we can foster understanding, tolerance, and unity. Our online store is not just a place to shop; it's a destination for cultural exploration, a source of inspiration, and a celebration of craftsmanship.

What We Offer:

In our online multicultural store, you'll discover an eclectic array of products that reflect the heart and soul of various cultures. From unique fashion pieces that tell stories of tradition and heritage to artisanal home decor that transforms your space into a global sanctuary, we curate our collection with care and authenticity.

Our Commitment:

At Mashallah Lifestyle, we are committed to sustainability, ethical sourcing, and supporting artisans from around the world. We believe in fair trade practices and aim to empower communities through our business endeavors.

Join Us on this Multicultural Journey:

We invite you to embark on this multicultural journey with us. Explore our store, be inspired by the stories behind each product, and join our community of culture enthusiasts.

All products are sourced fairly and we take the utmost care in providing you with high quality crystals that we are drawn to. 

With a passion for all things crystals, we have combined our intuition and knowledge to provide a space where we can share our spirit and love and to vibrate the energy we want to attract.

全朋友是港澳首創跨境社交OMO電商發展的互聯網企業，通過跨境的優勢將全球好貨通過線上線下的結合帶給更多的客友，在此電商的發展基礎下設立新型的“新奇站OMO品牌連鎖店”，將傳統線下的連鎖店結合線上連鎖店的優勢同步經營，並且引入相應的內容創作為對新奇產品的附加價值提高品牌的價值形成的新式全域度的互聯網模式。

我們始終以“讓商業豐富生命的意義”作為企業發展的使命，我們期待能通過商業喚醒人在商業組織的獨立的意志，讓個人能更具有創造力和感受到自身的生命力，應用商業的價值讓每個人都能具備對自身以及未來對社會改變的第二夢想，通過證明商業模式以及人才培養的成功印證和讓更多人能參與到新商業組織以“意義”為終歸的新型組織，從而讓全人類的商業的目標能以人類的命運作為載體共尋人類在宇宙中的“生命意義”。

Our mission is simple: to help people hear better, live better. Whether you're experiencing mild hearing loss, need smarter solutions for work or education, or simply want crystal-clear audio at home or on the go, we make it easy to find the right products — with trusted guidance, seamless support, and a user-friendly shopping experience.
 OTC Hearing Aids & Accessories
 High-Performance Headphones & TV Listening Systems

 Leisure & Lifestyle Audio (Bone Conduction, Hearing Protection)
We’re here for everyone — from adults 50+ exploring OTC hearing aids to parents of children with auditory processing needs, from music lovers to swimmers and public speakers. Founded by a team with deep experience in healthcare, tech, and operations, we aim to be the go-to online destination for hearing health and sound clarity.
 Direct-to-consumer |  UK Fulfilment |  Expert-Approved Products
Discover how hearing well can fit effortlessly into your everyday life.

Name: Lune & Line
Description:
Lune & Line creates guided journals designed for life transitions, emotional wellness, and personal growth.

We specialize in reflective writing tools that help individuals navigate major life events, process emotions, and find clarity during periods of change.

Our journals are used by 
therapists
counselors
social workers, 
corporate wellness teams
HR leaders
wellness coaches
nonprofit programs
mental health professionals, 
and community organizations seeking structured resources to support the emotional and mental well-being of the people they serve.

Each journal is built to provide:
• Structured reflection to support emotional processing
• Guided prompts for navigating difficult transitions
• Supportive writing exercises for clarity, healing, and resilience
• Evidence-based journaling frameworks rooted in emotional wellness
• Tools for self-awareness, stress reduction, and mental clarity

Our products are intentionally designed for individuals experiencing:
• Major life transitions
• Emotional overwhelm
• Loss or change
• Identity shifts
• Personal growth and self-discovery
• Stress, burnout, or decision fatigue

Who We Serve:
Lune & Line partners with:
• Mental health professionals
• Corporate wellness departments
• Employee assistance programs (EAPs)
• Wellness facilitators and coaches
• Nonprofits and community organizations
• Universities and student support services
• HR and People Operations leaders

Our mission:
To create real, accessible tools that support emotional well-being, clarity, and resilience for people experiencing real-life challenges.

Lune & Line journals bring together structure, reflection, and emotional grounding, helping individuals slow down, process deeply, and navigate transitions with strength and intention.

If you support mental wellness, emotional well-being, employee well-being, or community-based support, we’d love to connect and collaborate.

Name: FydMee
Description:
FydMee is a smart cloud-based POS platform that takes care of everything in a restaurant's journey, whether you're running a fine dining spot, a fast food joint, a coffee shop, or even a food truck. It starts with a terminal for restaurant owners to manage vendors and their supplies. This terminal connects right to the main inventory, allowing restaurant owners to manage orders, sales, tables, discounts, employees, etc., and it's linked to the ordering' terminal. Servers get orders from here and make sure everything runs smoothly. FydMee also offers shifts and task management, as well as guest reservations, waitlisting, and check-in services. Additionally, it integrates with other bookkeeping, delivery and other various service software. To ensure seamless kitchen operations, FydMee includes kitchen and bar display terminals. What's really cool is that FydMee is microservice-based software, so you can pick and choose only the features you need. This way, you save by not paying for features that you don't need.

But that's not all—there's a mobile app for customers too! If preferred, this app lets customers order food, keep an eye on their order's progress, call the server when they need something, split the bill if they're in a group, tip the servers, and even pay for everything when they're done. So, FydMee doesn't just handle the cooking and serving; it connects everyone involved and ensures things work well.

Name: The Grape Kitchen
Description:
Welcome to the Grape Kitchen!
We are a great place to buy wine, find recipes and elevate your palate.

We’re dedicated to bringing you the best wine at affordable prices, while helping to enhance your drinking and dining experiences!

Why The Grape Kitchen?

We’re not going to bore you with what you see on 99% of wine merchant websites. We hate it when you see things like “we only buy wines that we like” or “our wines are expertly selected and quality tested”. There’s no point in claiming these things because they’re just a given. The best part of our job is sampling wine, so if we weren’t trying them before we bought them then we’d be literally falling at the first hurdle.

Essentially, the reason why you should choose to buy from The Grape Kitchen is if you believe the same as we do. If you love wine and have an interest in learning more about it or need a good pairing recommendation, then we’re the company for you.

We’re not about overcharging, we’re about building a community of people who trust us to help elevate their eating and drinking experiences. Drinking good wine doesn’t have to be an expensive hobby, and a little bit of knowledge can go a long way.

We also understand that service and communication is key, that’s why we offer free same working day delivery to all South Yorkshire addresses on orders £20 and above, with the checkout code SYorks21 (same working day delivery if order is placed before 2pm).

We have to charge a delivery fee to folks further afield, but we have subsidised these costs and it will only cost you £6.99 for a courier delivery. Better yet, if you spend £80 or more then we’ll cover the full courier cost!

From our kitchen to yours, cheers!

Um diese Passion Wirklichkeit werden zu lassen, haben wir die Marke Bookiepad unter der Next Chapter GmbH gegründet. Name: Šamponi.si
Description:
Šamponi.si je spletna trgovina, ki ponuja vrhunsko kozmetiko za nego las in lasišča, zasnovana na temelju dolgoletne tradicije in strokovnosti. Matično podjetje MERCH d.o.o. sta ustanovila hči in sin frizerske mojstrice Minke z željo, da z znanjem in izkušnjami, pridobljenimi v Frizerskem salonu Pri Minki, pomagata širši množici.

Frizerski salon Pri Minki, pod vodstvom frizerske mojstrice Minke, že več kot 30 let skrbi za negovane lase in zadovoljstvo svojih strank. S tem bogatim znanjem in izkušnjami sta se njena hči in sin odločila, da svoje strokovno znanje preneseta na splet in tako omogočita dostop do vrhunskih izdelkov za nego las vsem, ki si želijo le najboljše za svoje lase.

Šamponi.si je namenjen vsem, ki si želijo kakovostne nege za svoje lase in lasišče. V naši ponudbi najdete široko izbiro šamponov, balzamov, mask, olj in drugih izdelkov za nego las, prilagojenih različnim tipom las in potrebam. Ponosni smo, da lahko našim strankam ponudimo izdelke priznanih blagovnih znamk, ki so znane po svoji učinkovitosti in kakovosti.

Posebno pozornost namenjamo naravnim in ekološkim proizvodom, saj verjamemo, da lahko le z uporabo najboljših sestavin dosežemo optimalne rezultate. Naša vizija je združiti strokovno znanje in vrhunske proizvode ter tako omogočiti našim strankam, da dosežejo zdravje in lepoto svojih las.

Zavedamo se, da je zadovoljstvo strank ključnega pomena, zato se trudimo zagotoviti hitro in zanesljivo dostavo ter vrhunsko uporabniško izkušnjo. Naša ekipa strokovnjakov je vedno na voljo za svetovanje in pomoč pri izbiri pravih izdelkov za vaše lase.

Pri Šamponi.si verjamemo, da si vsak zasluži najboljšo nego za svoje lase. Zato nenehno širimo našo ponudbo in sledimo najnovejšim trendom ter inovacijam na področju nege las. Naš cilj je postati prva izbira za nego las v Sloveniji in širše.

Obiščite nas na www.samponi.si in odkrijte širok nabor vrhunskih izdelkov za nego las in lasišča. Prepustite se strokovnosti in tradiciji Frizerskega salona

Wir glauben an die Kraft von Bitcoin, um Freiheit und eine bessere Welt zu fördern, und deshalb spenden wir einen Teil unserer Gewinne für wohltätige Zwecke. Bei SatoshiStoreIO sind wir mehr als nur ein Warenunternehmen - wir sind eine Gemeinschaft von Menschen, die an die Zukunft von Bitcoin für eine bessere, gerechtere und friedlichere Welt glauben.

Wir sind stolz darauf, eine breite Palette von Bitcoin Produkten anzubieten, von Kleidung und Accessoires bis hin zu Haushaltswaren und technischen Gadgets. Alle unsere Produkte werden sorgfältig ausgewählt, um sicherzustellen, dass sie unseren hohen Standards für Qualität und Stil entsprechen. Ob Sie ein erfahrener Bitcoin-Enthusiast oder gerade erst anfangen, wir haben für jeden etwas dabei.

Bei SatoshiStoreIO sind wir leidenschaftlich daran interessiert, Neulinge in der besten Gemeinschaft der Welt - der Bitcoin-Community - zu unterstützen! Wir glauben, dass jeder die Möglichkeit haben sollte, über die Welt von Bitcoin und Selbstbestimmung  zu lernen und daran teilzuhaben, und deshalb sind wir darauf spezialisiert, den Menschen dabei zu helfen, anzufangen. Ob Sie nach Rat, Informationen oder einfach nur einem freundlichen Gespräch suchen, wir sind hier, um zu helfen.

Wenn Sie also einen One-Stop-Shop für alle Ihre Bitcoin-Merchandise-Bedürfnisse suchen, suchen Sie nicht weiter als SatoshiStoreIO. Schließen Sie sich uns an und seien Sie Teil einer Gemeinschaft, die für Freiheit, eine bessere Welt und eine gerechte und friedliche Zukunft steht.

 Notre Expertise

Grâce à notre expertise technique et notre souci du détail, nos produits offrent une expérience de jeu inégalée, alliant performance et convivialité.

 Engagés pour l'Environnement 

Chez WaterSoft, nous sommes conscients de notre impact sur l'environnement, c'est pourquoi nous nous efforçons de réduire notre empreinte écologique. Nous utilisons des matériaux respectueux de l'environnement et nous adoptons des pratiques de fabrication responsables, dans le respect des normes écologiques les plus strictes.

 Partenariats et Collaboration 

Nous croyons en la force de la collaboration pour créer des synergies et des opportunités de croissance. Chez WaterSoft, nous sommes ouverts aux partenariats stratégiques avec d'autres entreprises partageant nos valeurs et notre passion pour l'innovation.

Rejoignez-nous dans notre aventure et découvrez le plaisir du jeu comme jamais auparavant ! Suivez-nous pour rester informé des dernières actualités, des lancements de produits et des événements passionnants.

#WaterSoft #PistoletsOrbeez

Name: Cycle Mate
Description:
Cycle Mate is the only find-and-fix puncture repair kit to get you back on the road, track or trail in minutes. 

No more buckets of water or long walks home. 

This compact kit is all you need when you're on the go.

The kit includes:

2 x clamping tyre levers
- to remove tyres from the rim with ease
- to hold the puncture detector in place
- are an extra pair of hands - clamp them together at the puncture site

Unique puncture detector
- finds the exact puncture site - tiny paddles spin when air from the puncture passes them
- can be held at any angle to help find the puncture fast
- works in all weather conditions
- no need to use water

Glue-less patch kit
- 6 x glue-less repair patches
- sandpaper to prepare for repair
- yellow crayon 

Cycle Mate is made in South Yorkshire, UK.

Name: UniCaddie
Description:
UniCaddie began with a simple yet unforgettable moment: watching two young golfers at home, swinging their clubs with pure joy. They celebrated every great shot with beaming smiles and laughed off every miss with infectious giggles. Their ability to find fun in every moment—whether they were on a high or a low—inspired us to create a brand that brings that same lighthearted spirit to golfers everywhere. 

At UniCaddie, we believe golf should be fun, inclusive, and enjoyable for everyone, no matter your age, gender, or skill level. Whether you’re a seasoned pro or just starting out, we want you to experience the joy of the game without the pressure of perfection.


We’re on a mission to make golf fun again. Through our quirky and stylish products—like funny ball markers, playful head covers, vibrant towels, and trendy golf polos—we aim to bring more smiles to the green and turn frustrations into laughter. We’re here to remind you that golf isn’t just about the scorecard; it’s about the memories you make, the connections you build, and the joy you find in every swing.

Join us in spreading the love and fun of golf. Let’s celebrate the great shots, laugh off the bad ones, and make every round an unforgettable experience.

UniCaddie: Because Golf is Better When You’re Having Fun! 

www.UniCaddie.com

Name: Chic Light
Description:

La lumière est fascinante. Chic Light souhaite amener cette fascination dans votre maison ! Chic Light est avant tout une équipe qui travaille sans relâche pour répondre aux projets les plus ambitieux, tout en garantissant le meilleur prix. Notre objectif est de continuer à grandir ensemble et répondre favorablement au changement énergétique. 
Notre engagement :

Notre philosophie :
L'engagement fait partie de l'ADN de Chic Light. Notre philosophie consiste à écouter et à anticiper les besoins de nos clients, aussi bien particuliers que professionnels.
Nous proposons une large gamme de produits, allant de l’éclairage simple aux luminaires décoratifs. Une équipe d’experts est à votre écoute pour vous apporter des solutions compétitives, flexibles et rapides.
Dans un secteur innovateur comme celui de l'éclairage, la qualité et la durabilité des produits sont essentiels.
Notre mission :
Chic Light  a une seule mission qui est la satisfaction de 100% de ses clients. Dans tous nos processus, nous plaçons le client au centre de nos priorités. 
Nous serons très heureux de participer à votre projet de vie et de contribuer au design de votre cocon familial.

SPARTUS är ett av de ledande varumärkena inom svetsindustrin i Polen. Vi är lyhörda för våra kunders behov och har introducerat svetspositionerare för europeisk produktion. Denna utrustning är gjord av material av hög kvalitet och hållbarhet. Trots användningen av moderna lösningar är enheterna fortfarande extremt lätta att använda. Användningen av lägesställare och rotatorer förkortar arbetstiden avsevärt. Det stöder repeterbarheten av processer med hög precision, vilket väsentligt bidrar till att erhålla en svets av hög kvalitet. 

Svetsning är den mest populära och universella sammanfogningsmetoden. Inom de områden där vi behöver uppfylla de högsta kvalitetskraven kan standardlösningar visa sig vara otillräckliga. I dagens verklighet, där varje kund letar efter mätbara besparingar, är SPARTUS ett varumärke som säkerställer att svetsarnas förväntningar tillfredsställs och att svetskvaliteten uppnås till ett rimligt pris.

Name: Humanus Group
Description:
A Humanus Group é uma empresa de comércio eletrónico que surgiu com o objetivo de oferecer aos consumidores uma experiência de compra personalizada e de qualidade. Com base no estudo de mercado e nas tendências de comportamento dos consumidores online, a empresa procura compreender os hábitos e necessidades dos clientes para os atender da melhor forma possível.

Com as mudanças ocorridas na sociedade e na economia nos últimos anos, o perfil do consumidor na era digital tem sofrido transformações significativas. Atualmente, as pessoas estão mais preocupadas com a sua saúde física, mental e financeira, e procuram marcas humanizadas, transparentes e empáticas para realizar as suas compras. A Humanus Group está atenta a essa demanda e dedica-se a oferecer produtos que correspondam às expectativas e satisfaçam as necessidades dos clientes.

Para alcançar esse objetivo, a empresa concentra-se no atendimento aos consumidores híbridos, que compram tanto em lojas físicas como online. Para isso, a Humanus Group realiza análises de mercado, estuda as características e tendências de comportamento dos consumidores e avalia os fatores que influenciam as suas decisões de compra. Dessa forma, a empresa consegue compreender a perceção dos consumidores em relação às diferentes marcas, produtos e serviços, além de entender os hábitos e costumes dos clientes no processo de pesquisa e compra.

A Humanus Group procura oferecer uma experiência de compra completa e personalizada, que atenda às expectativas dos clientes. A empresa valoriza a transparência, empatia e humanização das marcas que compõem o seu portfólio, e está sempre atenta à reputação dos seus produtos oferecidos. Com essa abordagem, a Humanus Group tem como objetivo gerar satisfação e fidelidade dos clientes, oferecendo um serviço de qualidade e confiança.

Name: CHARLLO | Papelaria com Propósito
Description:
A história da Charllo começa lá em 2008, com a criação da Charllot Gifts — uma loja online especializada em lembrancinhas e itens personalizados para festas. Com dedicação e carinho, a marca cresceu e conquistou seu espaço físico no tradicional bairro da Vila Maria, na Zona Norte de São Paulo.

Mas como toda jornada tem seus ciclos, a pandemia trouxe desafios inesperados. Com o fechamento dos salões de festas e os cancelamentos em série, a Charllot Gifts encerrou suas atividades. Foi nesse momento de pausa e reinvenção que nasceu a Charllo.

A transição não foi apenas empresarial, mas também pessoal. Ao retornar ao mercado de trabalho, surgiu uma necessidade real: encontrar organizadores que fossem mais do que bonitos — que fossem funcionais, práticos e adaptáveis à rotina. Foi assim que, em 2021, nasceu o Smart Planner: uma fusão entre caderno e planner, totalmente personalizável, da capa ao conteúdo, pensado para acompanhar diferentes estilos de vida.

A Charllo é fruto desse movimento de recolhimento e crescimento. Uma loja online minimalista, feita para quem busca mais propósito e organização no dia a dia. Aqui, você escolhe não só a capa que representa sua jornada, mas também os elementos que vão te acompanhar nela.

Mais do que produtos, oferecemos ferramentas para que você se conecte com seus objetivos e construa uma rotina com mais sentido.

Estamos aqui para apoiar você no seu propósito.
